_meta.description: Machine-readable index of all papers in the Self-as-an-End Theory Series
_meta.author: Han Qin (秦汉)

papers.title: Systems, Emergence, and the Conditions of Personhood
papers.subtitle: 系统、涌现与人的条件：以主体作为目的本身为核心的规范社会理论
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: Internal Colonization and the Reconstruction of Subjecthood
papers.subtitle: 内在殖民与主体重建：主体作为目的本身的个体与关系条件
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: The Complete Self-as-an-End Framework
papers.subtitle: 三层二维统一结构：Self-as-an-End 的完整框架
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: How Is Subjecthood Possible: Symmetry, Negativity, and Subjecthood
papers.subtitle: 主体性如何可能：对称性、否定性与主体性
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: How Is the Inter-Ontological Possible: The Subjective Conditions and Emergent Structure of Freedom
papers.subtitle: 本体之间如何可能：自由的主体条件与涌现结构 — Coexistence between subjects emerges from internal plurality within each subject, not from externally imposed order. Two-dimensional model: base layer (is the subject's own cannot-not established?) and emergent layer (can the subject empathize with another's cannot-not?). Introjected colonization, three-criterion test, four quadrants (Q1–Q4). Foundation Paper 5.
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: How Is Institution Possible: From Inter-Ontological Remainder to Co-Constructive Framework
papers.subtitle: 制度如何可能：从主体间余项到共构框架 — When mutual chiseling and walk-away are insufficient, institution becomes necessary. Seven-tier retroductive derivation from interstellar civilizations to marriage; five propositions (Axiom Invariance, Institutional Variability, Thickness Determination, Self-Chiseling Necessity, Minimization Principle). Completes the "How Is X Possible" trilogy. Foundation Paper 6.
papers.section: Foundational Papers

papers.title: Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
papers.subtitle: 方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  2. Philosophy 哲学




  
    Applied — Philosophy 哲学
  
  

    
      08
      
        Philosophy Application: From Descartes to Self-as-an-End
        哲学应用：从笛卡尔到Self-as-an-End
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18779382
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      11
      
        Structural Coordinates of the History of Philosophy
        哲学史的结构坐标：Self-as-an-End框架的哲学史应用
        
          Zenodo: 18842897
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      10
      
        Remainder Conservation and the Eternal Life of Self-as-an-End
        余项守恒与Self-as-an-End的永生
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18821952
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A10
      
        Remainder Conservation and Dual-Path Structure
        余项守恒与双路径结构：一个思想实验
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18811079
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A11
      
        From Living-toward-Death to Non Dubito: Completing Kant (9D–10D)
        从向死而生到Non Dubito：完成康德（9D–10D）
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18808585
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A13
      
        Education as Subject-Condition: A Philosophy of Education
        教育作为主体条件：一种教育哲学
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18867390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A16
      
        One's Own Law: The SAE Critique of Ethics and Morality
        自己的法：SAE对伦理与道德的批判
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19037566
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Applied — Aesthetics & Art 美学·艺术
  
  

    
      A2
      
        Aesthetics as a Structural Field of Subject-Conditions
        审美作为主体条件的结构性场域
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18748931
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      06
      
        Art History Application: Aesthetics and the SAE Framework
        艺术史应用：审美、艺术史与Self-as-an-End框架
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18775062
          ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Aesthetics & Essay 美学论文
  
  


    
      Aes
      
        SAE Judgment and Aesthetics — In Tribute to Kant
        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. Three propositions (cannot not be beautiful; no supreme beauty; cannot not be questioned); six theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Internality of Context, Anti-Correlation, Dimensional Irreducibility, Conservation of Locus, Thickening); thirteen beauties (0DD–16DD) with 12DD–13DD phase transition; subject conditions (cannot not feel → cannot not pursue → cannot not be questioned). Third pillar of SAE alongside methodology and ethics. Prescription for "The Artist Is Dead."
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19296710
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Art
      
        The Artist Is Dead: One-Dimensional Civilization Is the Killer
        艺术家已死：单向度的文明是凶手 — Why great art has disappeared: one-dimensional civilization optimizes for recognition and selection signals rather than the full chisel-construct cycle. Marcuse's "one-dimensional man" reread through 13DD/14DD lens; the artist-as-remainder; four predictions including why AI-era art accelerates the crisis; prescription for the remainder-generator.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19104160
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  





  
    Metaphysics Series

    SAE Aesthetics & Essay 美学论文
  
  


    
      Aes
      
        SAE Judgment and Aesthetics — In Tribute to Kant
        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. Three propositions (cannot not be beautiful; no supreme beauty; cannot not be questioned); six theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Internality of Context, Anti-Correlation, Dimensional Irreducibility, Conservation of Locus, Thickening); thirteen beauties (0DD–16DD) with 12DD–13DD phase transition; subject conditions (cannot not feel → cannot not pursue → cannot not be questioned). Third pillar of SAE alongside methodology and ethics. Prescription for "The Artist Is Dead."
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19296710
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Art
      
        The Artist Is Dead: One-Dimensional Civilization Is the Killer
        艺术家已死：单向度的文明是凶手 — Why great art has disappeared: one-dimensional civilization optimizes for recognition and selection signals rather than the full chisel-construct cycle. Marcuse's "one-dimensional man" reread through 13DD/14DD lens; the artist-as-remainder; four predictions including why AI-era art accelerates the crisis; prescription for the remainder-generator.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19104160
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  





  
    Metaphysics Series

papers.title: SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
papers.subtitle: Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  2. Philosophy 哲学




  
    Applied — Philosophy 哲学
  
  

    
      08
      
        Philosophy Application: From Descartes to Self-as-an-End
        哲学应用：从笛卡尔到Self-as-an-End
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18779382
          EN / ZH

          Zenodo: 18842897

        One's Own Law: The SAE Critique of Ethics and Morality
        自己的法：SAE对伦理与道德的批判
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19037566

        艺术家已死：单向度的文明是凶手 — Why great art has disappeared: one-dimensional civilization optimizes for recognition and selection signals rather than the full chisel-construct cycle. Marcuse's "one-dimensional man" reread through 13DD/14DD lens; the artist-as-remainder; four predictions including why AI-era art accelerates the crisis; prescription for the remainder-generator.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19104160
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  





  
    Metaphysics Series

papers.title: The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
papers.subtitle: 凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

        SAE Judgment and Aesthetics — In Tribute to Kant
        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. Three propositions (cannot not be beautiful; no supreme beauty; cannot not be questioned); six theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Internality of Context, Anti-Correlation, Dimensional Irreducibility, Conservation of Locus, Thickening); thirteen beauties (0DD–16DD) with 12DD–13DD phase transition; subject conditions (cannot not feel → cannot not pursue → cannot not be questioned). Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  2. Philosophy 哲学




  
    Applied — Philosophy 哲学
  
  

    
      08
      
        Philosophy Application: From Descartes to Self-as-an-End
        哲学应用：从笛卡尔到Self-as-an-End
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18779382
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      11
      
        Structural Coordinates of the History of Philosophy
        哲学史的结构坐标：Self-as-an-End框架的哲学史应用
        
          Zenodo: 18842897
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      10
      
        Remainder Conservation and the Eternal Life of Self-as-an-End
        余项守恒与Self-as-an-End的永生
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18821952
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A10
      
        Remainder Conservation and Dual-Path Structure
        余项守恒与双路径结构：一个思想实验
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18811079
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A11
      
        From Living-toward-Death to Non Dubito: Completing Kant (9D–10D)
        从向死而生到Non Dubito：完成康德（9D–10D）
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18808585
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A13
      
        Education as Subject-Condition: A Philosophy of Education
        教育作为主体条件：一种教育哲学
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18867390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A16
      
        One's Own Law: The SAE Critique of Ethics and Morality
        自己的法：SAE对伦理与道德的批判
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19037566
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Applied — Aesthetics & Art 美学·艺术
  
  

    
      A2
      
        Aesthetics as a Structural Field of Subject-Conditions
        审美作为主体条件的结构性场域
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18748931
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      06
      
        Art History Application: Aesthetics and the SAE Framework
        艺术史应用：审美、艺术史与Self-as-an-End框架
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18775062
          ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Aesthetics & Essay 美学论文
  
  


    
      Aes
      
        SAE Judgment and Aesthetics — In Tribute to Kant
        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. Three propositions (cannot not be beautiful; no supreme beauty; cannot not be questioned); six theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Internality of Context, Anti-Correlation, Dimensional Irreducibility, Conservation of Locus, Thickening); thirteen beauties (0DD–16DD) with 12DD–13DD phase transition; subject conditions (cannot not feel → cannot not pursue → cannot not be questioned). Third pillar of SAE alongside methodology and ethics. Prescription for "The Artist Is Dead."
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19296710
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Art
      
        The Artist Is Dead: One-Dimensional Civilization Is the Killer
        艺术家已死：单向度的文明是凶手 — Why great art has disappeared: one-dimensional civilization optimizes for recognition and selection signals rather than the full chisel-construct cycle. Marcuse's "one-dimensional man" reread through 13DD/14DD lens; the artist-as-remainder; four predictions including why AI-era art accelerates the crisis; prescription for the remainder-generator.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19104160
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  





  
    Metaphysics Series

        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

        SAE Judgment and Aesthetics — In Tribute to Kant
        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. Three propositions (cannot not be beautiful; no supreme beauty; cannot not be questioned); six theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Internality of Context, Anti-Correlation, Dimensional Irreducibility, Conservation of Locus, Thickening); thirteen beauties (0DD–16DD) with 12DD–13DD phase transition; subject conditions (cannot not feel → cannot not pursue → cannot not be questioned). Third pillar of SAE alongside methodology and ethics. Prescription for "The Artist Is Dead."
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19296710

        艺术家已死：单向度的文明是凶手 — Why great art has disappeared: one-dimensional civilization optimizes for recognition and selection signals rather than the full chisel-construct cycle. Marcuse's "one-dimensional man" reread through 13DD/14DD lens; the artist-as-remainder; four predictions including why AI-era art accelerates the crisis; prescription for the remainder-generator.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19104160
          EN / ZH

      M

      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification

The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH

        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH

        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH

        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548

Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH

        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953

        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH

        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH

        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH

        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440

The zero-point beneath Methodology M.

The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH
