papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH

The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH

The zero-point beneath Methodology M.

Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH

      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953

        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018

        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned.         方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH

The zero-point beneath Methodology M.

        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M

          ZH / EN

The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH

        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH

Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH

Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613

      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH

          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列
  
  

    
      Epis-I
      
        Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503146
          EN / ZH

        SAE判断力与美学 — Beauty is the structural state that cannot not occur when construct fully unfolds at a given dimension. papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  
    SAE Epistemology Series 认知论系列

        不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19502953
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-II
      
        Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
        不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503018
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-III
      
        Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
        不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503097
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Epis-IV
      
        Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
        不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.

papers.section:
SAE Methodology Series 方法论系列
  
  

    
      M-00
      
        Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
        方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19657440
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-0
      
        非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
        论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19544620
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M
      
        SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle
        Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环——从第一刀到物自体
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450
          ZH / EN
        
      
    

    
      M-I
      
        Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
        分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18907877
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-II
      
        The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
        凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18918195
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-III
      
        How to Find Remainders with AI
        怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18929390
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IV
      
        SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
        SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19275104
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-V
      
        The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
        主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19359613
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VI
      
        Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
        相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636548
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VII
      
        Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
        否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19481305
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-VIII
      
        The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
        人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19581538
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      M-IX
      
        SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
        意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19639034
          EN / ZH

papers.title: The UAP_Ω Theorem, Slow Decrease, Cyclotomic Discount Rates, and the Two Final Gaps for H′
papers.subtitle: UAP_Ω 定理、Slow Decrease、分圆折扣率与 H′ 的最终两个 Gap — UAP_Ω^{SW} proved from Gafni-Robles 2025 AP Selberg-Delange. Slow Decrease Theorem proved (eliminates one Tauberian condition). Prime-layer gap precisely identified: (D-C)/s boundary pseudofunction behavior; Hölder continuity as intermediate target. Cyclotomic Discount Rate CDR ≈ 0.97 (Zsigmondy). RQSA hypothesis proposed. H′ now has two precise mathematical targets.

papers.title: Character Stripping, Deterministic Square-Function, and the Precise Localization of H′
papers.subtitle: 特征剥离，确定性方函数，与H'的精确定位 — η(p) 94% positive bias identified as p mod 12 arithmetic masquerade; character-stripped dyadic blocks B_j decay at ≈ C·2^{−j/2} (white-noise rate, exponential vs provable √j bound); gap formalized as DSF_α. Tauberian condition proved unconditionally. Prime-power layer analytic at boundary. Closure chain: DSF_α + BL. Twenty-four unconditional results at N = 10⁷, 10⁹, 10¹⁰. Paper 49's two gaps transformed into precisely stated, formally testable mathematical objects.

papers.title: Exponential Block Decay, Spectral Reformulation, and the Periodogram Target for H′
papers.subtitle: 指数级块衰减，谱重表述，与H'的周期图目标 — Corrects Paper 50: B_j decays at ~2^{−j} (exponential), not 2^{−j/3}; factor ~j above WN from off-diagonal correlations O_j/D_j ~ j. Conductor-invariant (Q = 2–360 slopes identical). Exact spectral target I_j(0) ≤ Cj·D_j implies DSF_α; gap from Cauchy-Schwarz to target = 2^j/j² (exponential). Divisor lemma: P(shared factor-subtree ≥ M) ≤ 2τ(d)/M. Four covariance-decay routes excluded; two viable routes remain. Closure chain: spectral target → DSF_α → (BL_α + SD + Karamata) → H'. 30 unconditional results at N = 10⁷–10¹⁰.

papers.title: Mean-Reversion, Spectral Valley, and the Projective Criterion for H′
papers.subtitle: 均值回归，谱谷，与H'的投射准则 — Three new discoveries: mean-reversion (long-run variance = 0 conditionally), spectral valley (periodogram dips below white-noise floor near ω=0), signed cancellation (positive/negative covariance terms cancel). Conditional Theorems I–II. Conjecture 52.1. Gordin coboundary decomposition as unifying framework. Routes 5–6 excluded.

papers.title: Screened Long Memory, the Screening Return Theorem, and the Polynomial Gap for H′
papers.subtitle: 屏蔽式长记忆，屏蔽回归定理，与H'的多项式距离 — Corrects Paper 52's "spectral valley" claim: θ=0 is a strict local maximum (curvature Σk²Γ_j(k) > 0 at all tested blocks j=14–32). Screening Return Theorem: F_j·L_j = o(N_j) implies E[I_j(0)] ≤ Cj·D_j. Extended experiments confirm F_j·L_j/N_j < 0.4 (j=20–32). Gap reduced to Hypothesis A (bounded overdispersion) + polynomial growth of F_j and L_j. 42 unconditional numerical results.

papers.title: Recursive Ancestor Inheritance and the Origin of Power-Law Covariance in h(p)
papers.subtitle: 递归祖先继承与h(p)幂律协方差的起源 — Identifies structural origin of power-law covariance: recursive ancestor inheritance through IC recursion tree. Corr(η(p−1), η((p−1)/2)) = 0.76 stable across j=20–32; per-layer innovation δ near-white (autocorr < 0.025). Layered Innovation Theorem: dyadic decomposition + geometrically decaying weights → power-law covariance upper bound. F_j polynomial (Conjecture 53.1 half-proved). L_j deferred to Paper 55. 10 experiments at N=10¹⁰.

papers.title: Damped Oscillation, the 70/30 Law, and the Positive-Tail Theorem
papers.subtitle: 阻尼振荡，70/30律，与正尾质量定理 — Corrects Paper 53: power-law covariance produces damped oscillation in block periodogram, not monotone decay. 70/30 Law: ~70% of block mass in positive tail, ~30% negative. Positive-Tail Theorem: under F_j polynomial and L_j polynomial (both now proved), spectral target E[I_j(0)] ≤ Cj·D_j follows from positive-tail dominance. Combined with Paper 54, closure chain for H' now rests on mean-to-deterministic upgrade only.

papers.title: The Affine Trough Theorem, Direct Spectral Ratio, and the Spectral Closure Equation
papers.subtitle: 仿射谷定理、直接谱比值与谱闭合方程 — Part I: Modified Affine Trough Theorem proves G̃_j must cross zero after k*=2 cycles at j=26,29 (filling Paper 55's signed gap). Part II: direct weighted spectral ratio R_j^wt=I_j(0)/(j·D_j) measured at j=20–32, bounded with no upward trend. Conjecture 56.2 (R_j^wt=O(1)) promoted to front-door conjecture; Papers 53–55 reinterpreted as the mechanism/proof program.

papers.title: The Screened Spectral Bound and the Block Mean Target
papers.subtitle: 筛选谱界与块均值目标 — Proves Theorem 57.1 (Screened Spectral Bound): under power-law autocorrelation buildup, post-crossover screening, and linear crossover scale, variance ratio Ψ_j ≤ 1+C·j^{1−α}, giving E[R_j^wt]=O(j^{−α})→0. Extended empirical data at 7 dyadic blocks (j=14–32); conditionally closes mean spectral target for the DSF branch under three conjectural inputs from Papers 53–56.

papers.subtitle: 确定性谱目标与BL_α——通过交叉积和谱导数 — Two deterministic conjectures replace three probabilistic gaps from Paper 57: Conjecture 58.1 (eventual cross-product negativity) + Conjecture 58.2 (spectral derivative sign) together imply BL_α ≤ 1 deterministically. Empirical verification at j=14–32; cross-product turns negative at j=23, spectral derivative bounded. Conditionally closes the DSF branch for H' with purely deterministic inputs.

papers.subtitle: 谱比有界性与H'的双猜想闭合 — Proves that Conjectures 58.1+58.2 (cross-product negativity + spectral derivative sign) together imply R_j^wt = O(1), completing the Two-Conjecture Closure of H' for the DSF branch. papers.subtitle: 收束——从"形式化必生余项"到H'的双猜想前沿 — Capstone paper of the ZFCρ series to date. papers.title: ZFCρ Paper LXI: A Conditional Reduction of the Spectral Derivative Bound
papers.subtitle: 谱导数界——从59.1到59.2的条件归约 — Shows that Conjecture 59.2 (spectral derivative bound) is a conditional corollary of Conjecture 59.1 (spectral ratio boundedness). Three key findings: (i) variance base of B^(k) layers decays geometrically; (ii) excess ratio R_j^(k) shows no systematic growth in k (k-uniformity); (iii) the sup bound is dominated by B^(1) for all 19 test blocks. Conjecture 59.2 is thereby demoted from an independent conjecture to a conditional consequence of 59.1 + k-uniformity.

      FF-P
      
        Light Speed, Dimensional Breakthrough, and the Coupling Constant Hierarchy
        光速、维度突破与耦合常数层级 — SAE Physics Series · Four Forces Prequel. DD Breakthrough theorem: c defined at 0DD→1DD; each breakthrough divides potency by c. DD Splitting: 2DD → left/right 3DD (parity origin) → 12 4DDs. Coupling constant prediction: α_G(M_Z) = α_em(M_Z)^{16.25}; observed ratio 16.2572, deviation 0.044%.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19341043
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-I
      
        Four Forces, Two Axioms: Unification of Source, Not Structure
        四种力、两条公理：来源的统一而非结构的统一 — SAE Physics Series · Four Forces Paper. Structural interpretation of U(1) × SU(2) × SU(3): remainder development → complex amplitudes → U(n); remainder conservation → SU(n). 1DD ↝ U(1), 2DD ↝ SU(2) (weak), 3DD ↝ SU(3) (strong). Gravity at 4DD as global bookkeeping constraint E₁+E₂=0, not a Yang-Mills gauge field.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19342107
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-II
      
        The Four Forces Paper II: Color, Hypercharge, and Dual-4DD Boundary Resolution
        四力篇II：色、超荷与双4DD边界分辨 — From SAE priors to the complete hypercharge table of one generation of fermions. Color triplet = complexification of 3D orthogonal complement to 4DD timelike direction. Quarks and leptons as two boundary-resolution images of one trans-dual family object. Fundamental hypercharge quantum 1/6 derived from equal-weight theorem on six 4DD facets. All five hypercharge values reproduced with zero continuous free parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19360102
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-III
      
        Labeling without Constructing: The DD Origin of the Weak Mixing Angle
        标而不造：弱混合角的DD起源——EW Matching Axiom下的条件定理 — 1DD labels without constructing: 16 = 2⁴ Weyl components form a four-layer binary structure; ν_R (y_SAE = 0) is the group-theoretic identity. EW Matching Axiom: sin²θ_W|DD eigen = 15/65 = 3/13 ≈ 0.2308. Experimental value 0.23122 deviates by +4.51×10⁻⁴ (−0.195%, ~7.5σ), consistent with one-loop radiative corrections. Conditional on Paper II hypercharge table + Prequel structural capacity 65.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19379412
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Gen
      
        Topological Origin of Three Fermion Generations and Their Mass Structure
        三代费米子的拓扑起源与质量结构 — Exact Three Generations Theorem (G2): from any 4DD block, 12 blocks fall into exactly 3 topological equivalence classes (2:4:6); no fourth class — unconditional group-theoretic result. Color-field redistribution (G6): common origin of fractional charge and mass redistribution. Quark/lepton doublet mass ratio G10 = 65/5 = 13; integers (15,65) shared with sin²θ_W = 15/65 and α_G = α_em^{65/4}; zero new continuous parameters. CKM small / PMNS large contrast explained by 3DD color-suppression. Falsifiable: m_c + m_s = 13m_μ. Joint χ² = 0.581, dof = 2, p = 0.748.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19394500
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-IV
      
        6-Block Pair Algebra, 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), and Lepton as a Color-Singlet Volume Line
        6-Block Pair Algebra，𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4)，与Lepton作为Color-Singlet Volume Line — From 6 pair-oriented blocks: pair algebra = 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), dim 15; complex structure J → ℂ³; adjoint decomposition 15 = 8+1+3+3̄; spinor 4 = 3⊕1 where singlet = holomorphic volume line Λ³U = lepton; 6 = Λ²(4); color-SU(3) "3" from spacetime d=4; quark-lepton pairing = representation-theoretic necessity. No GUT assumed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19411672
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-V
      
        Four Forces Paper V: The Counting Origin of Coupling Constants and the Generating-Function Unification of 65/4
        耦合常数的计数起源与65/4的生成函数统一 — Unifies sin²θ_W = 3/13 (Paper III) and α_G = α_em^{65/4} (Prequel) under a single generating function Z(t) = e^{κln(1−α+αt)} with κ = 65/4. New structured conjecture: α_s = (65/4)α_em(1 − c·α_em) where c = π/(3√2). DD combinatorial constants {4,13,15,65}; sin²θ_W = 3/13 corresponds to inverse of first factor in (13/3)×(15/4) = 65/4. Zero new continuous parameters within gauge-coupling subpackage.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19415805
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VI
      
        Four Forces Paper VI: Why GUT-Predicted Proton Decay Remains Absent — Spin(10) as Classification Algebra and the GUT Prediction Blind Spot
        为什么GUT预测的质子衰变持续缺席——Spin(10)作为分类群与大统一预测盲区的结构性解释 — GUTs predict 45 gauge bosons; SAE framework accommodates 12; observation = 12. Spin(10) / SO(10) functions as a classification algebra (representation container), not a dynamical gauge group. GUT prediction failure is a structural category error: treating a mathematical classification tool as a physical symmetry to be broken. Proton decay, monopoles, and coupling unification are artifacts of the misidentification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19426068
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VII
      
        Four Forces Paper VII: S³ Packing Theorem and the Three-Layer Structure of Coupling Constants
        S³ Packing定理与耦合常数的三层修正结构 — S³ Packing Theorem: the three gauge-coupling constants arise from three geometrically distinct packing layers on S³ (Hopf fibration structure). Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VIII
      
        Four Forces Paper VIII: The Hierarchical Dissolution of Strong CP
        强CP问题的层级消解 — Strong CP is not a fine-tuning problem within the SAE framework: the θ-term is absent because CP violation enters only at layers where it is structurally permitted. Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Fin
      
        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale
        力的语法：四力系列收束篇 — Synthesizes Papers I–VIII into a unified "grammar": force is not fundamental but emergent from the DD remainder structure. Four forces = four distinct ways remainder conservation manifests across layers. Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19464447
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      SAE-PF
      
        Cross-Layer Closure Equations: From Euler's Formula to the Event Horizon
        跨层闭合方程：从欧拉公式到事件视界 · SAE框架的物理基础 — Two remainders + one act → closure, extended from ZFCρ Paper II's L₀–L₃ table to physical layers L₃→L₄ and L₄→L₅. L₃→L₄: Schwarzschild condition rc²−2GM=0 (ct and G as remainders). L₄→L₅: Boltzmann relation S−k_B ln W=0. Three meta-observations: bookend structure, decreasing tightness, birth of physical dimensions. P1/P2 unification: remainder must develop = single remainder unfolds; remainder conservation = dual found, E₁+E₂=0, closure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19361950
          EN / ZH

      FF-II
      
        The Four Forces Paper II: Color, Hypercharge, and Dual-4DD Boundary Resolution
        四力篇II：色、超荷与双4DD边界分辨 — From SAE priors to the complete hypercharge table of one generation of fermions. Color triplet = complexification of 3D orthogonal complement to 4DD timelike direction. Quarks and leptons as two boundary-resolution images of one trans-dual family object. Fundamental hypercharge quantum 1/6 derived from equal-weight theorem on six 4DD facets. All five hypercharge values reproduced with zero continuous free parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19360102
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-III
      
        Labeling without Constructing: The DD Origin of the Weak Mixing Angle
        标而不造：弱混合角的DD起源——EW Matching Axiom下的条件定理 — 1DD labels without constructing: 16 = 2⁴ Weyl components form a four-layer binary structure; ν_R (y_SAE = 0) is the group-theoretic identity. EW Matching Axiom: sin²θ_W|DD eigen = 15/65 = 3/13 ≈ 0.2308. Experimental value 0.23122 deviates by +4.51×10⁻⁴ (−0.195%, ~7.5σ), consistent with one-loop radiative corrections. Conditional on Paper II hypercharge table + Prequel structural capacity 65.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19379412
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Gen
      
        Topological Origin of Three Fermion Generations and Their Mass Structure
        三代费米子的拓扑起源与质量结构 — Exact Three Generations Theorem (G2): from any 4DD block, 12 blocks fall into exactly 3 topological equivalence classes (2:4:6); no fourth class — unconditional group-theoretic result. Color-field redistribution (G6): common origin of fractional charge and mass redistribution. Quark/lepton doublet mass ratio G10 = 65/5 = 13; integers (15,65) shared with sin²θ_W = 15/65 and α_G = α_em^{65/4}; zero new continuous parameters. CKM small / PMNS large contrast explained by 3DD color-suppression. Falsifiable: m_c + m_s = 13m_μ. Joint χ² = 0.581, dof = 2, p = 0.748.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19394500
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-IV
      
        6-Block Pair Algebra, 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), and Lepton as a Color-Singlet Volume Line
        6-Block Pair Algebra，𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4)，与Lepton作为Color-Singlet Volume Line — From 6 pair-oriented blocks: pair algebra = 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), dim 15; complex structure J → ℂ³; adjoint decomposition 15 = 8+1+3+3̄; spinor 4 = 3⊕1 where singlet = holomorphic volume line Λ³U = lepton; 6 = Λ²(4); color-SU(3) "3" from spacetime d=4; quark-lepton pairing = representation-theoretic necessity. No GUT assumed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19411672
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-V
      
        Four Forces Paper V: The Counting Origin of Coupling Constants and the Generating-Function Unification of 65/4
        耦合常数的计数起源与65/4的生成函数统一 — Unifies sin²θ_W = 3/13 (Paper III) and α_G = α_em^{65/4} (Prequel) under a single generating function Z(t) = e^{κln(1−α+αt)} with κ = 65/4. New structured conjecture: α_s = (65/4)α_em(1 − c·α_em) where c = π/(3√2). DD combinatorial constants {4,13,15,65}; sin²θ_W = 3/13 corresponds to inverse of first factor in (13/3)×(15/4) = 65/4. Zero new continuous parameters within gauge-coupling subpackage.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19415805
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VI
      
        Four Forces Paper VI: Why GUT-Predicted Proton Decay Remains Absent — Spin(10) as Classification Algebra and the GUT Prediction Blind Spot
        为什么GUT预测的质子衰变持续缺席——Spin(10)作为分类群与大统一预测盲区的结构性解释 — GUTs predict 45 gauge bosons; SAE framework accommodates 12; observation = 12. Spin(10) / SO(10) functions as a classification algebra (representation container), not a dynamical gauge group. GUT prediction failure is a structural category error: treating a mathematical classification tool as a physical symmetry to be broken. Proton decay, monopoles, and coupling unification are artifacts of the misidentification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19426068
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VII
      
        Four Forces Paper VII: S³ Packing Theorem and the Three-Layer Structure of Coupling Constants
        S³ Packing定理与耦合常数的三层修正结构 — S³ Packing Theorem: the three gauge-coupling constants arise from three geometrically distinct packing layers on S³ (Hopf fibration structure). Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VIII
      
        Four Forces Paper VIII: The Hierarchical Dissolution of Strong CP
        强CP问题的层级消解 — Strong CP is not a fine-tuning problem within the SAE framework: the θ-term is absent because CP violation enters only at layers where it is structurally permitted. Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Fin
      
        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale
        力的语法：四力系列收束篇 — Synthesizes Papers I–VIII into a unified "grammar": force is not fundamental but emergent from the DD remainder structure. Four forces = four distinct ways remainder conservation manifests across layers. Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.

          EN / ZH

Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH

        Four Forces Paper VIII: The Hierarchical Dissolution of Strong CP
        强CP问题的层级消解 — Strong CP is not a fine-tuning problem within the SAE framework: the θ-term is absent because CP violation enters only at layers where it is structurally permitted. Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Fin
      
        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale
        力的语法：四力系列收束篇 — Synthesizes Papers I–VIII into a unified "grammar": force is not fundamental but emergent from the DD remainder structure. Four forces = four distinct ways remainder conservation manifests across layers. Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19464447
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      SAE-PF
      
        Cross-Layer Closure Equations: From Euler's Formula to the Event Horizon
        跨层闭合方程：从欧拉公式到事件视界 · SAE框架的物理基础 — Two remainders + one act → closure, extended from ZFCρ Paper II's L₀–L₃ table to physical layers L₃→L₄ and L₄→L₅. L₃→L₄: Schwarzschild condition rc²−2GM=0 (ct and G as remainders). L₄→L₅: Boltzmann relation S−k_B ln W=0. Three meta-observations: bookend structure, decreasing tightness, birth of physical dimensions. P1/P2 unification: remainder must develop = single remainder unfolds; remainder conservation = dual found, E₁+E₂=0, closure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19361950

papers.subtitle: 三代费米子的拓扑起源与质量结构 — Exact Three Generations Theorem (G2): from any 4DD block, 12 blocks fall into exactly 3 topological equivalence classes (2:4:6); no fourth class — unconditional group-theoretic result. Color-field redistribution (G6): common origin of fractional charge and mass redistribution. Quark/lepton doublet mass ratio G10 = 65/5 = 13; integers (15,65) shared with sin²θ_W = 15/65 and α_G = α_em^{65/4}; zero new continuous parameters.         6-Block Pair Algebra，𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4)，与Lepton作为Color-Singlet Volume Line — From 6 pair-oriented blocks: pair algebra = 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), dim 15; complex structure J → ℂ³; adjoint decomposition 15 = 8+1+3+3̄; spinor 4 = 3⊕1 where singlet = holomorphic volume line Λ³U = lepton; 6 = Λ²(4); color-SU(3) "3" from spacetime d=4; quark-lepton pairing = representation-theoretic necessity. No GUT assumed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19411672
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-V
      
        Four Forces Paper V: The Counting Origin of Coupling Constants and the Generating-Function Unification of 65/4
        耦合常数的计数起源与65/4的生成函数统一 — Unifies sin²θ_W = 3/13 (Paper III) and α_G = α_em^{65/4} (Prequel) under a single generating function Z(t) = e^{κln(1−α+αt)} with κ = 65/4. New structured conjecture: α_s = (65/4)α_em(1 − c·α_em) where c = π/(3√2). DD combinatorial constants {4,13,15,65}; sin²θ_W = 3/13 corresponds to inverse of first factor in (13/3)×(15/4) = 65/4. Zero new continuous parameters within gauge-coupling subpackage.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19415805
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VI
      
        Four Forces Paper VI: Why GUT-Predicted Proton Decay Remains Absent — Spin(10) as Classification Algebra and the GUT Prediction Blind Spot
        为什么GUT预测的质子衰变持续缺席——Spin(10)作为分类群与大统一预测盲区的结构性解释 — GUTs predict 45 gauge bosons; SAE framework accommodates 12; observation = 12. Spin(10) / SO(10) functions as a classification algebra (representation container), not a dynamical gauge group. GUT prediction failure is a structural category error: treating a mathematical classification tool as a physical symmetry to be broken. Proton decay, monopoles, and coupling unification are artifacts of the misidentification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19426068
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VII
      
        Four Forces Paper VII: S³ Packing Theorem and the Three-Layer Structure of Coupling Constants
        S³ Packing定理与耦合常数的三层修正结构 — S³ Packing Theorem: the three gauge-coupling constants arise from three geometrically distinct packing layers on S³ (Hopf fibration structure). Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-VIII
      
        Four Forces Paper VIII: The Hierarchical Dissolution of Strong CP
        强CP问题的层级消解 — Strong CP is not a fine-tuning problem within the SAE framework: the θ-term is absent because CP violation enters only at layers where it is structurally permitted. Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Fin
      
        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale
        力的语法：四力系列收束篇 — Synthesizes Papers I–VIII into a unified "grammar": force is not fundamental but emergent from the DD remainder structure. Four forces = four distinct ways remainder conservation manifests across layers. Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19464447
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      SAE-PF
      
        Cross-Layer Closure Equations: From Euler's Formula to the Event Horizon
        跨层闭合方程：从欧拉公式到事件视界 · SAE框架的物理基础 — Two remainders + one act → closure, extended from ZFCρ Paper II's L₀–L₃ table to physical layers L₃→L₄ and L₄→L₅. L₃→L₄: Schwarzschild condition rc²−2GM=0 (ct and G as remainders). L₄→L₅: Boltzmann relation S−k_B ln W=0. Three meta-observations: bookend structure, decreasing tightness, birth of physical dimensions. P1/P2 unification: remainder must develop = single remainder unfolds; remainder conservation = dual found, E₁+E₂=0, closure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19361950
          EN / ZH

Structural interpretation of U(1) × SU(2) × SU(3): remainder development → complex amplitudes → U(n); remainder conservation → SU(n). 1DD ↝ U(1), 2DD ↝ SU(2) (weak), 3DD ↝ SU(3) (strong).
