EW Matching Axiom: sin²θ_W|DD eigen = 15/65 = 3/13 ≈ 0.2308. Experimental value 0.23122 deviates by +4.51×10⁻⁴ (−0.195%, ~7.5σ), consistent with one-loop radiative corrections. Conditional on Paper II hypercharge table + Prequel structural capacity 65.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19379412
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-Gen
      
        Topological Origin of Three Fermion Generations and Their Mass Structure
        三代费米子的拓扑起源与质量结构 — Exact Three Generations Theorem (G2): from any 4DD block, 12 blocks fall into exactly 3 topological equivalence classes (2:4:6); no fourth class — unconditional group-theoretic result. Color-field redistribution (G6): common origin of fractional charge and mass redistribution. Quark/lepton doublet mass ratio G10 = 65/5 = 13; integers (15,65) shared with sin²θ_W = 15/65 and α_G = α_em^{65/4}; zero new continuous parameters. CKM small / PMNS large contrast explained by 3DD color-suppression. Falsifiable: m_c + m_s = 13m_μ. Joint χ² = 0.581, dof = 2, p = 0.748.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19394500
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-IV
      
        6-Block Pair Algebra, 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), and Lepton as a Color-Singlet Volume Line
        6-Block Pair Algebra，𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4)，与Lepton作为Color-Singlet Volume Line — From 6 pair-oriented blocks: pair algebra = 𝔰𝔬(6) ≅ 𝔰𝔲(4), dim 15; complex structure J → ℂ³; adjoint decomposition 15 = 8+1+3+3̄; spinor 4 = 3⊕1 where singlet = holomorphic volume line Λ³U = lepton; 6 = Λ²(4); color-SU(3) "3" from spacetime d=4; quark-lepton pairing = representation-theoretic necessity. No GUT assumed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19411672
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      FF-V
      
        Four Forces Paper V: The Counting Origin of Coupling Constants and the Generating-Function Unification of 65/4
        耦合常数的计数起源与65/4的生成函数统一 — Unifies sin²θ_W = 3/13 (Paper III) and α_G = α_em^{65/4} (Prequel) under a single generating function Z(t) = e^{κln(1−α+αt)} with κ = 65/4. New structured conjecture: α_s = (65/4)α_em(1 − c·α_em) where c = π/(3√2). DD combinatorial constants {4,13,15,65}; sin²θ_W = 3/13 corresponds to inverse of first factor in (13/3)×(15/4) = 65/4. Zero new continuous parameters within gauge-coupling subpackage.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19415805
          EN / ZH

        Four Forces Paper VI: Why GUT-Predicted Proton Decay Remains Absent — Spin(10) as Classification Algebra and the GUT Prediction Blind Spot
        为什么GUT预测的质子衰变持续缺席——Spin(10)作为分类群与大统一预测盲区的结构性解释 — GUTs predict 45 gauge bosons; SAE framework accommodates 12; observation = 12. Spin(10) / SO(10) functions as a classification algebra (representation container), not a dynamical gauge group. GUT prediction failure is a structural category error: treating a mathematical classification tool as a physical symmetry to be broken. Proton decay, monopoles, and coupling unification are artifacts of the misidentification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19426068
          EN / ZH

        Four Forces Paper VII: S³ Packing Theorem and the Three-Layer Structure of Coupling Constants
        S³ Packing定理与耦合常数的三层修正结构 — S³ Packing Theorem: the three gauge-coupling constants arise from three geometrically distinct packing layers on S³ (Hopf fibration structure). Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH

        Four Forces Paper VIII: The Hierarchical Dissolution of Strong CP
        强CP问题的层级消解 — Strong CP is not a fine-tuning problem within the SAE framework: the θ-term is absent because CP violation enters only at layers where it is structurally permitted. Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH

        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale

Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19464447
          EN / ZH

        Cross-Layer Closure Equations: From Euler's Formula to the Event Horizon
        跨层闭合方程：从欧拉公式到事件视界 · SAE框架的物理基础 — Two remainders + one act → closure, extended from ZFCρ Paper II's L₀–L₃ table to physical layers L₃→L₄ and L₄→L₅.           EN / ZH

Structural interpretation of U(1) × SU(2) × SU(3): remainder development → complex amplitudes → U(n); remainder conservation → SU(n). 1DD ↝ U(1), 2DD ↝ SU(2) (weak), 3DD ↝ SU(3) (strong). Gravity at 4DD as global bookkeeping constraint E₁+E₂=0, not a Yang-Mills gauge field.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19342107
          EN / ZH

Quarks and leptons as two boundary-resolution images of one trans-dual family object. Fundamental hypercharge quantum 1/6 derived from equal-weight theorem on six 4DD facets. All five hypercharge values reproduced with zero continuous free parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19360102
          EN / ZH

EW Matching Axiom: sin²θ_W|DD eigen = 15/65 = 3/13 ≈ 0.2308. Experimental value 0.23122 deviates by +4.51×10⁻⁴ (−0.195%, ~7.5σ), consistent with one-loop radiative corrections. Conditional on Paper II hypercharge table + Prequel structural capacity 65.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19379412
          EN / ZH

Color-field redistribution (G6): common origin of fractional charge and mass redistribution. Quark/lepton doublet mass ratio G10 = 65/5 = 13; integers (15,65) shared with sin²θ_W = 15/65 and α_G = α_em^{65/4}; zero new continuous parameters. New structured conjecture: α_s = (65/4)α_em(1 − c·α_em) where c = π/(3√2). DD combinatorial constants {4,13,15,65}; sin²θ_W = 3/13 corresponds to inverse of first factor in (13/3)×(15/4) = 65/4. Zero new continuous parameters within gauge-coupling subpackage.

        为什么GUT预测的质子衰变持续缺席——Spin(10)作为分类群与大统一预测盲区的结构性解释 — GUTs predict 45 gauge bosons; SAE framework accommodates 12; observation = 12. Spin(10) / SO(10) functions as a classification algebra (representation container), not a dynamical gauge group. GUT prediction failure is a structural category error: treating a mathematical classification tool as a physical symmetry to be broken. Proton decay, monopoles, and coupling unification are artifacts of the misidentification.

Refines Paper V's generating-function conjecture: α_s correction term c = π/(3√2) derived from S³ geometry rather than fitted. Three-layer hierarchy (U(1), SU(2), SU(3)) maps to Hopf fiber, base, total space respectively. Zero new continuous parameters.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19433221
          EN / ZH

Hierarchical dissolution: at 3DD (strong force layer), the remainder structure forbids a CP-odd topological term. The apparent "problem" is an artifact of importing a 4DD (spacetime) symmetry concept into a 3DD layer. No axion required.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19450289
          EN / ZH

        The Grammar of Force: Self-as-an-End Four Forces Series — Finale

Four forces = four distinct ways remainder conservation manifests across layers. Finale consolidates: U(1) from 1DD phase remainder, SU(2) from 2DD polarity remainder, SU(3) from 3DD volume remainder, gravity from 4DD global bookkeeping. Grammar = the structural logic that makes forces necessary rather than contingent.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19464447
          EN / ZH

        跨层闭合方程：从欧拉公式到事件视界 · SAE框架的物理基础 — Two remainders + one act → closure, extended from ZFCρ Paper II's L₀–L₃ table to physical layers L₃→L₄ and L₄→L₅.           EN / ZH

papers.title: The R₁ Closure Equation and the Conditional Extraction of α_em
papers.subtitle: R₁闭合方程与α_em的条件性反推 — Builds on Four Forces VII's R₁ = 3/(2α) derivation. Proves correction coefficients obey recurrence c_{n+2} = (27/4)c_n with α leakage; multiplicative correction gives R₁ = (3/2α)·(1 + Σcₙαⁿ). R₁ Closure Equation: α_em extracted conditionally from the recurrence structure and S³ packing geometry. Three independent extraction routes agree within 0.3%.
papers.section:
SAE Mass Series 质量系列
  
  

    
      Mass-I
      
        The R₁ Closure Equation and the Conditional Extraction of α_em
        R₁闭合方程与α_em的条件性反推 — Builds on Four Forces VII's R₁ = 3/(2α) derivation. Proves correction coefficients obey recurrence c_{n+2} = (27/4)c_n with α leakage; multiplicative correction gives R₁ = (3/2α)·(1 + Σcₙαⁿ). R₁ Closure Equation: α_em extracted conditionally from the recurrence structure and S³ packing geometry. Three independent extraction routes agree within 0.3%.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19476359
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Mass-II
      
        DD Resolvent Object and Unified Readout of Physical Constants
        DD Resolvent Object与物理常数的统一读出 — Introduces the DD Resolvent Object as the unified algebraic structure from which physical constants are read out. Extends the R₁ closure framework to a broader set of constants; establishes the resolvent construction and its relation to the DD geometry. Unifies α_em, mass ratios, and other constants within a single algebraic readout scheme.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19480791
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Mass-III
      
        DD Structure of the Periodic Table: From Proton Mass to Stability Limits
        元素周期表的DD结构：从质子质量到稳定性极限 — Third Class A mass formula (sub-10 ppb). Full periodic table DD-layer assignment from hydrogen to oganesson; Z=118 stability boundary derived from DD geometry. Proton mass derivation extended; nuclear shell structure reinterpreted as DD-layer transitions. Periodic law as a corollary of the DD resolvent construction.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19493939
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Mass-IV
      
        The DD Ladder of Stars: From Hydrogen to Iron to Collapse
        恒星的DD阶梯：从氢到铁到塌缩 — Stellar evolution reread as DD-layer ascent: hydrogen ignition as DD crossing, helium/CNO cycles as intermediate rungs, iron core as the terminal rung where nuclear binding energy can no longer support the DD climb. Collapse (neutron star or black hole) as DD-layer truncation. Mass thresholds (Chandrasekhar, Tolman–Oppenheimer–Volkoff) derived from DD geometry constraints.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501307
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Mass-V
      
        Four Bridges and Black Holes: From the Genesis of Force to the Silence of the Horizon
        四座桥与黑洞：从力的生成到视界的沉默 — The four fundamental forces reread as four DD-layer bridges; black holes as the state where all four bridges are severed — no information can climb any bridge outward. Hawking radiation as a residual DD-bridge leak at the horizon. Event horizon silence derived structurally from DD-layer inaccessibility rather than from GR geodesic incompleteness alone.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501533
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Mass-Conv
      
        The Nature of Information: E/c³
        信息的本质：E/c³ — Mass Series convergence paper. E/c³ as the 4DD form of energy; information gains ontological status alongside energy, momentum, mass. 4DD closure as the structural root of thermodynamic irreversibility. Energy-information conservation across 42 1DDs; Hawking radiation as return through the self-leakage channel. Third-order closure law when 4DD is active: E³ = p³c³ + m³c⁶ + I³c⁹.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19510869
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  





  
    Thought Experiments — 思想实验

papers.section:
Thermodynamics & Chemistry 热力学·化学
  
  


    
      ZFCρ Thermo
      
        Fluctuation Absorption Rate η ≪ 1: Strong Complementary Cancellation and Nonequilibrium Stability in a Zero-Parameter Min Recursion
        涨落吸收率 η ≪ 1：零参数 min 递推中的强互补消涨与非平衡稳定性 — Thermodynamic interface paper: η = Var(output)/Var(input) ≪ 1 proven for the DP min recursion via strong complementary cancellation (Δf·Δr anti-correlated). Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19310282
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo II
      
        Microscopic Mechanism of the Fluctuation Absorption Rate η: From Per-Layer Innovation to Damped Oscillation
        涨落吸收率η的微观机制：从层间创新到阻尼振荡 — Mechanistic answer to why canonical DP value η ≈ 0.2.       Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Different anesthetic agents and doses suppress different fine-layers of 13DD in controllable, reversible, dose-dependent ways, constituting structural natural experiments. Derives the three-position model of 13DD (narrative, negation, conflict-monitoring) and maps each anesthetic agent to its specific layer targets. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH

        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Non-trivial prediction: prolonged DoC patients' prefrontal / DMN cortices may show slower epigenetic aging than age-matched controls, with nurturing implication — don't give up too soon.

        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Physical processes carry remainder; ESSP (exclusive same-sex partner preference) is the behavioral manifestation of unfolding remainder. Four sex determination systems compared (mammalian XY, avian ZW, reptilian TSD, fish social-signal). Asking "why does SSB exist" is like asking "why does sculpting produce debris" — the answer lies in the structure of the sculpting act itself. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.

  6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Different anesthetic agents and doses suppress different fine-layers of 13DD in controllable, reversible, dose-dependent ways, constituting structural natural experiments. Derives the three-position model of 13DD (narrative, negation, conflict-monitoring) and maps each anesthetic agent to its specific layer targets. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH

Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.

          EN / ZH

Detrended residual field χ(p) decomposed by dyadic layer reveals: within-layer autocorrelation C(1) ≈ 0.96 (96% inherited, 4% innovation); m_eff ≈ 5.47 effective layers per oscillation cycle; compound dissipation 1−0.96^5.47 ≈ 0.20. Scale-invariant conditional variance Var(χ|v₂=ℓ) ≈ 0.5 across 25 layers. 455M primes, N=10¹⁰ verification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19511065

This paper derives q from ZFCρ first principles via the channel-averaged shielding law: q − 1 encodes the ratio of structured inter-channel coupling to total fluctuation. Unifies across scales; derives the four empirical q-values from a single formula.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19605665
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19649781
          EN / ZH

        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VI: Causal Correlation Volume, Tail-Active Multiplicative Coupling, and the Conditional Derivation of the Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        因果相关体积与通道归一化卷绕比的条件性推导 — Introduces causal correlation volume as a structural measure of thermodynamic coupling and establishes tail-active multiplicative coupling as the mechanism by which long-range correlations propagate through the spectral hierarchy. Derives the channel-normalized winding ratio conditionally from these inputs, closing the loop between the dynamical prediction of Paper V and the static framework of Paper IV.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH

      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH

Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH

The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408

      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain

Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH

      ZFCρ Thermo

        涨落吸收率 η ≪ 1：零参数 min 递推中的强互补消涨与非平衡稳定性 — Thermodynamic interface paper: η = Var(output)/Var(input) ≪ 1 proven for the DP min recursion via strong complementary cancellation (Δf·Δr anti-correlated). Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.

        涨落吸收率η的微观机制：从层间创新到阻尼振荡 — Mechanistic answer to why canonical DP value η ≈ 0.2. Detrended residual field χ(p) decomposed by dyadic layer reveals: within-layer autocorrelation C(1) ≈ 0.96 (96% inherited, 4% innovation); m_eff ≈ 5.47 effective layers per oscillation cycle; compound dissipation 1−0.96^5.47 ≈ 0.20. Scale-invariant conditional variance Var(χ|v₂=ℓ) ≈ 0.5 across 25 layers. 455M primes, N=10¹⁰ verification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19511065
          EN / ZH

Derives canonical f/r extraction procedures and classifies dynamical regimes of η. Establishes the structural bridge between ZFCρ thermodynamics and nonequilibrium statistical mechanics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19597685
          EN / ZH

This paper derives q from ZFCρ first principles via the channel-averaged shielding law: q − 1 encodes the ratio of structured inter-channel coupling to total fluctuation. Unifies across scales; derives the four empirical q-values from a single formula.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19605665
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo V
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper V: The Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        通道归一化卷绕比与Tsallis q的动力学预测 — Introduces the channel-normalized winding ratio as a dynamical variable in state-coupled oscillators and derives a dynamical prediction for the Tsallis q parameter. Extends the first-principles framework of Paper IV from static derivation to dynamical regime: q is not only structurally derivable but dynamically trackable as winding evolves across coupling channels.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19649781
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VI
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VI: Causal Correlation Volume, Tail-Active Multiplicative Coupling, and the Conditional Derivation of the Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        因果相关体积与通道归一化卷绕比的条件性推导 — Introduces causal correlation volume as a structural measure of thermodynamic coupling and establishes tail-active multiplicative coupling as the mechanism by which long-range correlations propagate through the spectral hierarchy. Derives the channel-normalized winding ratio conditionally from these inputs, closing the loop between the dynamical prediction of Paper V and the static framework of Paper IV.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VII

        有限因果槽、Renewal封装与层级非Boltzmann Kernel的操作性起源 — Introduces finite causal slots as a thermodynamic constraint on information processing and renewal encapsulation as the mechanism that insulates completed operations from ongoing ones. Derives hierarchical non-Boltzmann kernels as the operational consequence of these two constraints, explaining why biological DD-layer systems deviate from standard Boltzmann statistics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH

        复制保真度、Renewal保留率与生物DD层级的热力学分工 — Analyzes copying fidelity and renewal retention as the two key thermodynamic parameters governing biological replication across DD layers.           EN / ZH

      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH

        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022

      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH

        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain

Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH

        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation

Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them.           DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH

        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH

        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH

Thermodynamics & Chemistry 热力学·化学
  
  


    
      ZFCρ Thermo
      
        Fluctuation Absorption Rate η ≪ 1: Strong Complementary Cancellation and Nonequilibrium Stability in a Zero-Parameter Min Recursion
        涨落吸收率 η ≪ 1：零参数 min 递推中的强互补消涨与非平衡稳定性 — Thermodynamic interface paper: η = Var(output)/Var(input) ≪ 1 proven for the DP min recursion via strong complementary cancellation (Δf·Δr anti-correlated). Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19310282
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo II
      
        Microscopic Mechanism of the Fluctuation Absorption Rate η: From Per-Layer Innovation to Damped Oscillation
        涨落吸收率η的微观机制：从层间创新到阻尼振荡 — Mechanistic answer to why canonical DP value η ≈ 0.2. Detrended residual field χ(p) decomposed by dyadic layer reveals: within-layer autocorrelation C(1) ≈ 0.96 (96% inherited, 4% innovation); m_eff ≈ 5.47 effective layers per oscillation cycle; compound dissipation 1−0.96^5.47 ≈ 0.20. Scale-invariant conditional variance Var(χ|v₂=ℓ) ≈ 0.5 across 25 layers. 455M primes, N=10¹⁰ verification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19511065
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo III
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper III: Canonical f/r Extraction and Regime Classification of the Fluctuation Absorption Rate η
        涨落吸收率η的规范提取与regime分类 — Introduces the convention-corrected coupling κ as a dimensionless, cross-scale-stable, dynamically endogenous, operationally measurable scalar. Derives canonical f/r extraction procedures and classifies dynamical regimes of η. Establishes the structural bridge between ZFCρ thermodynamics and nonequilibrium statistical mechanics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19597685
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo IV
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper IV: Toward a First-Principles Derivation of the Tsallis q Parameter
        Tsallis q参数的第一性原理推导与通道平均屏蔽律 — The Tsallis q parameter (QGP q ≈ 1.15, cosmic rays q ≈ 1.2, solar wind q ≈ 1.7) has been empirically fitted for 30+ years without derivation. This paper derives q from ZFCρ first principles via the channel-averaged shielding law: q − 1 encodes the ratio of structured inter-channel coupling to total fluctuation. Unifies across scales; derives the four empirical q-values from a single formula.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19605665
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo V
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper V: The Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        通道归一化卷绕比与Tsallis q的动力学预测 — Introduces the channel-normalized winding ratio as a dynamical variable in state-coupled oscillators and derives a dynamical prediction for the Tsallis q parameter. Extends the first-principles framework of Paper IV from static derivation to dynamical regime: q is not only structurally derivable but dynamically trackable as winding evolves across coupling channels.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19649781
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VI
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VI: Causal Correlation Volume, Tail-Active Multiplicative Coupling, and the Conditional Derivation of the Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        因果相关体积与通道归一化卷绕比的条件性推导 — Introduces causal correlation volume as a structural measure of thermodynamic coupling and establishes tail-active multiplicative coupling as the mechanism by which long-range correlations propagate through the spectral hierarchy. Derives the channel-normalized winding ratio conditionally from these inputs, closing the loop between the dynamical prediction of Paper V and the static framework of Paper IV.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VII: Finite Causal Slots, Renewal Encapsulation, and the Operational Origin of Hierarchical Non-Boltzmann Kernels
        有限因果槽、Renewal封装与层级非Boltzmann Kernel的操作性起源 — Introduces finite causal slots as a thermodynamic constraint on information processing and renewal encapsulation as the mechanism that insulates completed operations from ongoing ones. Derives hierarchical non-Boltzmann kernels as the operational consequence of these two constraints, explaining why biological DD-layer systems deviate from standard Boltzmann statistics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VIII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VIII: Copying Fidelity, Renewal Retention, and the Thermodynamic Division of Labor across Biological DD Layers
        复制保真度、Renewal保留率与生物DD层级的热力学分工 — Analyzes copying fidelity and renewal retention as the two key thermodynamic parameters governing biological replication across DD layers. Derives the thermodynamic division of labor: different DD layers specialize in different thermodynamic regimes, with copying fidelity and retention rates co-evolving under the constraints established in Papers VI and VII.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19688304
          EN / ZH

      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH

        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.

        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VIII: Copying Fidelity, Renewal Retention, and the Thermodynamic Division of Labor across Biological DD Layers
        复制保真度、Renewal保留率与生物DD层级的热力学分工 — Analyzes copying fidelity and renewal retention as the two key thermodynamic parameters governing biological replication across DD layers. Derives the thermodynamic division of labor: different DD layers specialize in different thermodynamic regimes, with copying fidelity and retention rates co-evolving under the constraints established in Papers VI and VII.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19688304
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  


  6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH

        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers

          EN / ZH

        Aging: The Running Cost of the Chisel-Construct Cycle
        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Second-order model: aging is not over-accumulation of damage (first-order) but progressive failure of the maintenance system itself (second-order).           DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364492
          EN / ZH

        The Remainder Structure of Sex Unfolding: A Cross-Phylum Non-Adaptive Model of Same-Sex Sexual Behavior
        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.
