  6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH

        固与选（四）——双向不疑封闭自意识
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859452

      12e
      
        Fixation, Fragility, and Radiation: A Structural Theory of Mass Extinction Dynamics
        固、脆弱与辐射：大灭绝动力学的结构性理论 — Applied: lock-in depth (path dependence + confirmation bias + energy streamlining) as the unifying variable across the Big Five; trigger as interaction partner selecting which lock-in axes become lethal; remainder-enrichment ratchet explains post-extinction directional complexity without teleology.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19225113
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A25
      
        Aging: The Running Cost of the Chisel-Construct Cycle
        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Second-order model: aging is not over-accumulation of damage (first-order) but progressive failure of the maintenance system itself (second-order). The tool of repair is itself aging — recursive degradation at every level (autophagy, synaptic downscaling, stem cells, telomerase). Core strategy: reduce maintenance load, not repair damage. Non-trivial prediction: prolonged DoC patients' prefrontal / DMN cortices may show slower epigenetic aging than age-matched controls, with nurturing implication — don't give up too soon.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364492
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A26
      
        The Remainder Structure of Sex Unfolding: A Cross-Phylum Non-Adaptive Model of Same-Sex Sexual Behavior
        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Physical processes carry remainder; ESSP (exclusive same-sex partner preference) is the behavioral manifestation of unfolding remainder. Four sex determination systems compared (mammalian XY, avian ZW, reptilian TSD, fish social-signal). Asking "why does SSB exist" is like asking "why does sculpting produce debris" — the answer lies in the structure of the sculpting act itself. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.

Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.

AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4

Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.

Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response.         Tsallis q参数的第一性原理推导与通道平均屏蔽律 — The Tsallis q parameter (QGP q ≈ 1.15, cosmic rays q ≈ 1.2, solar wind q ≈ 1.7) has been empirically fitted for 30+ years without derivation.   6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Different anesthetic agents and doses suppress different fine-layers of 13DD in controllable, reversible, dose-dependent ways, constituting structural natural experiments. Derives the three-position model of 13DD (narrative, negation, conflict-monitoring) and maps each anesthetic agent to its specific layer targets. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Applied — Biology & Evolution 生物学·演化
  
  

    
      12a
      
        Fixation and Selection (I) — Causal Law Forecloses Distinction
        固与选（一）——因果律封闭区分
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859363
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12b
      
        Fixation and Selection (II) — Reproductive Law Forecloses Replication
        固与选（二）——繁殖律封闭复制
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859393
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12c
      
        Fixation and Selection (III) — Predictive Law Forecloses Choice
        固与选（三）——预测律封闭选择
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859427
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12d
      
        Fixation and Selection (IV) — Bilateral Non-Doubt Forecloses Self-Awareness
        固与选（四）——双向不疑封闭自意识
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859452
          EN
        
      
    

    
      12e
      
        Fixation, Fragility, and Radiation: A Structural Theory of Mass Extinction Dynamics
        固、脆弱与辐射：大灭绝动力学的结构性理论 — Applied: lock-in depth (path dependence + confirmation bias + energy streamlining) as the unifying variable across the Big Five; trigger as interaction partner selecting which lock-in axes become lethal; remainder-enrichment ratchet explains post-extinction directional complexity without teleology.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19225113
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A25
      
        Aging: The Running Cost of the Chisel-Construct Cycle
        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Second-order model: aging is not over-accumulation of damage (first-order) but progressive failure of the maintenance system itself (second-order). The tool of repair is itself aging — recursive degradation at every level (autophagy, synaptic downscaling, stem cells, telomerase). Core strategy: reduce maintenance load, not repair damage. Non-trivial prediction: prolonged DoC patients' prefrontal / DMN cortices may show slower epigenetic aging than age-matched controls, with nurturing implication — don't give up too soon.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364492
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A26
      
        The Remainder Structure of Sex Unfolding: A Cross-Phylum Non-Adaptive Model of Same-Sex Sexual Behavior
        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Physical processes carry remainder; ESSP (exclusive same-sex partner preference) is the behavioral manifestation of unfolding remainder. Four sex determination systems compared (mammalian XY, avian ZW, reptilian TSD, fish social-signal). Asking "why does SSB exist" is like asking "why does sculpting produce debris" — the answer lies in the structure of the sculpting act itself. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364915
          EN / ZH

      12c
      
        Fixation and Selection (III) — Predictive Law Forecloses Choice
        固与选（三）——预测律封闭选择
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859427

      12d
      
        Fixation and Selection (IV) — Bilateral Non-Doubt Forecloses Self-Awareness
        固与选（四）——双向不疑封闭自意识
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859452
          EN
        
      
    

    
      12e
      
        Fixation, Fragility, and Radiation: A Structural Theory of Mass Extinction Dynamics
        固、脆弱与辐射：大灭绝动力学的结构性理论 — Applied: lock-in depth (path dependence + confirmation bias + energy streamlining) as the unifying variable across the Big Five; trigger as interaction partner selecting which lock-in axes become lethal; remainder-enrichment ratchet explains post-extinction directional complexity without teleology.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19225113

      A25
      
        Aging: The Running Cost of the Chisel-Construct Cycle
        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Second-order model: aging is not over-accumulation of damage (first-order) but progressive failure of the maintenance system itself (second-order). The tool of repair is itself aging — recursive degradation at every level (autophagy, synaptic downscaling, stem cells, telomerase). Core strategy: reduce maintenance load, not repair damage. Non-trivial prediction: prolonged DoC patients' prefrontal / DMN cortices may show slower epigenetic aging than age-matched controls, with nurturing implication — don't give up too soon.

        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Physical processes carry remainder; ESSP (exclusive same-sex partner preference) is the behavioral manifestation of unfolding remainder. Four sex determination systems compared (mammalian XY, avian ZW, reptilian TSD, fish social-signal). Asking "why does SSB exist" is like asking "why does sculpting produce debris" — the answer lies in the structure of the sculpting act itself. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.

papers.section:
Thermodynamics & Chemistry 热力学·化学
  
  


    
      ZFCρ Thermo
      
        Fluctuation Absorption Rate η ≪ 1: Strong Complementary Cancellation and Nonequilibrium Stability in a Zero-Parameter Min Recursion
        涨落吸收率 η ≪ 1：零参数 min 递推中的强互补消涨与非平衡稳定性 — Thermodynamic interface paper: η = Var(output)/Var(input) ≪ 1 proven for the DP min recursion via strong complementary cancellation (Δf·Δr anti-correlated). Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19310282
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo II
      
        Microscopic Mechanism of the Fluctuation Absorption Rate η: From Per-Layer Innovation to Damped Oscillation
        涨落吸收率η的微观机制：从层间创新到阻尼振荡 — Mechanistic answer to why canonical DP value η ≈ 0.2. Detrended residual field χ(p) decomposed by dyadic layer reveals: within-layer autocorrelation C(1) ≈ 0.96 (96% inherited, 4% innovation); m_eff ≈ 5.47 effective layers per oscillation cycle; compound dissipation 1−0.96^5.47 ≈ 0.20. Scale-invariant conditional variance Var(χ|v₂=ℓ) ≈ 0.5 across 25 layers. 455M primes, N=10¹⁰ verification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19511065
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo III
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper III: Canonical f/r Extraction and Regime Classification of the Fluctuation Absorption Rate η
        涨落吸收率η的规范提取与regime分类 — Introduces the convention-corrected coupling κ as a dimensionless, cross-scale-stable, dynamically endogenous, operationally measurable scalar. Derives canonical f/r extraction procedures and classifies dynamical regimes of η. Establishes the structural bridge between ZFCρ thermodynamics and nonequilibrium statistical mechanics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19597685
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo IV
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper IV: Toward a First-Principles Derivation of the Tsallis q Parameter
        Tsallis q参数的第一性原理推导与通道平均屏蔽律 — The Tsallis q parameter (QGP q ≈ 1.15, cosmic rays q ≈ 1.2, solar wind q ≈ 1.7) has been empirically fitted for 30+ years without derivation. This paper derives q from ZFCρ first principles via the channel-averaged shielding law: q − 1 encodes the ratio of structured inter-channel coupling to total fluctuation. Unifies across scales; derives the four empirical q-values from a single formula.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19605665
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo V
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper V: The Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        通道归一化卷绕比与Tsallis q的动力学预测 — Introduces the channel-normalized winding ratio as a dynamical variable in state-coupled oscillators and derives a dynamical prediction for the Tsallis q parameter. Extends the first-principles framework of Paper IV from static derivation to dynamical regime: q is not only structurally derivable but dynamically trackable as winding evolves across coupling channels.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19649781
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VI
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VI: Causal Correlation Volume, Tail-Active Multiplicative Coupling, and the Conditional Derivation of the Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio
        因果相关体积与通道归一化卷绕比的条件性推导 — Introduces causal correlation volume as a structural measure of thermodynamic coupling and establishes tail-active multiplicative coupling as the mechanism by which long-range correlations propagate through the spectral hierarchy. Derives the channel-normalized winding ratio conditionally from these inputs, closing the loop between the dynamical prediction of Paper V and the static framework of Paper IV.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VII: Finite Causal Slots, Renewal Encapsulation, and the Operational Origin of Hierarchical Non-Boltzmann Kernels
        有限因果槽、Renewal封装与层级非Boltzmann Kernel的操作性起源 — Introduces finite causal slots as a thermodynamic constraint on information processing and renewal encapsulation as the mechanism that insulates completed operations from ongoing ones. Derives hierarchical non-Boltzmann kernels as the operational consequence of these two constraints, explaining why biological DD-layer systems deviate from standard Boltzmann statistics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VIII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VIII: Copying Fidelity, Renewal Retention, and the Thermodynamic Division of Labor across Biological DD Layers
        复制保真度、Renewal保留率与生物DD层级的热力学分工 — Analyzes copying fidelity and renewal retention as the two key thermodynamic parameters governing biological replication across DD layers. Derives the thermodynamic division of labor: different DD layers specialize in different thermodynamic regimes, with copying fidelity and retention rates co-evolving under the constraints established in Papers VI and VII.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19688304
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  


  6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Different anesthetic agents and doses suppress different fine-layers of 13DD in controllable, reversible, dose-dependent ways, constituting structural natural experiments. Derives the three-position model of 13DD (narrative, negation, conflict-monitoring) and maps each anesthetic agent to its specific layer targets. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH

      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH

        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis

Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.

Lindley queue verification (M/M/1, M/D/1, M/Pareto/1). Nonequilibrium stability without parameter tuning; 24 references; Appendix A: 17-row DP recursion table.

Scale-invariant conditional variance Var(χ|v₂=ℓ) ≈ 0.5 across 25 layers. 455M primes, N=10¹⁰ verification.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19511065
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19597685

This paper derives q from ZFCρ first principles via the channel-averaged shielding law: q − 1 encodes the ratio of structured inter-channel coupling to total fluctuation. Unifies across scales; derives the four empirical q-values from a single formula.

          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19649781
          EN / ZH

        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VI: Causal Correlation Volume, Tail-Active Multiplicative Coupling, and the Conditional Derivation of the Channel-Normalized Winding Ratio

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH

Derives hierarchical non-Boltzmann kernels as the operational consequence of these two constraints, explaining why biological DD-layer systems deviate from standard Boltzmann statistics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH

Derives the thermodynamic division of labor: different DD layers specialize in different thermodynamic regimes, with copying fidelity and retention rates co-evolving under the constraints established in Papers VI and VII.

          EN / ZH

        因果相关体积与通道归一化卷绕比的条件性推导 — Introduces causal correlation volume as a structural measure of thermodynamic coupling and establishes tail-active multiplicative coupling as the mechanism by which long-range correlations propagate through the spectral hierarchy. Derives the channel-normalized winding ratio conditionally from these inputs, closing the loop between the dynamical prediction of Paper V and the static framework of Paper IV.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19658596
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VII: Finite Causal Slots, Renewal Encapsulation, and the Operational Origin of Hierarchical Non-Boltzmann Kernels
        有限因果槽、Renewal封装与层级非Boltzmann Kernel的操作性起源 — Introduces finite causal slots as a thermodynamic constraint on information processing and renewal encapsulation as the mechanism that insulates completed operations from ongoing ones. Derives hierarchical non-Boltzmann kernels as the operational consequence of these two constraints, explaining why biological DD-layer systems deviate from standard Boltzmann statistics.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19673079
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ZFCρ Thermo VIII
      
        ZFCρ Thermodynamics Paper VIII: Copying Fidelity, Renewal Retention, and the Thermodynamic Division of Labor across Biological DD Layers
        复制保真度、Renewal保留率与生物DD层级的热力学分工 — Analyzes copying fidelity and renewal retention as the two key thermodynamic parameters governing biological replication across DD layers. Derives the thermodynamic division of labor: different DD layers specialize in different thermodynamic regimes, with copying fidelity and retention rates co-evolving under the constraints established in Papers VI and VII.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19688304
          EN / ZH
        
      
    
  


  6. Biology 生物学




  
    SAE Biology Notes 生物学笔记
  
  

    
      Bio-1
      
        Phase Transition Window in Metabolic Oncology
        代谢肿瘤学中的相变窗口 — ZFCρ phase-transition window Ω ∈ [2.75, 4.01] mapped to metabolic biology: Ω = number of functionally coupled independent metabolic pathways per cell. Warburg effect = Ω-collapse; ketosis = bridge replacement. Four-phase therapeutic dynamics (sprouting → spectral flip → flip → establishment, asymmetry ratio r ≈ 5). Metabolic conservation law: reconfiguration exposes new vulnerabilities at new coupling points. Six non-trivial predictions with falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19492774
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-2
      
        The Same "Cannot Speak," Three Fault Lines, Three Remedies
        同一个"说不出话"，三种断层，三套药方：SAE框架下的失语鉴别与修复路径 — Starting from Mike Fincke's 20-minute speech loss on the ISS (Jan 7, 2026), argues that "cannot speak" conceals three mechanistically distinct fault lines: 13DD dropout (language faculty offline, all modalities fail simultaneously), 11DD orthographic memory deficit (modality-specific retrieval failure), and 10DD output-channel breakdown (motor execution impaired, language competence intact). Each requires a distinct repair pathway; misdirected treatment is actively harmful. Proposes the Best Available Channel Principle as frontline triage. Analyzes patient self-colonization risk under mismatched regimes.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19499329
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-3
      
        Drugs for Weight Loss, Psychoanalysis for Weight Gain
        减肥靠吃药，增重靠心理分析：饮食障碍的SAE层级分析 — Obesity and anorexia nervosa (AN) analyzed as two phases of a single layered system. Obesity: 12DD pattern-consolidation in a food-abundant environment, where GLP-1 agonists (Ozempic) work by disrupting the 12DD reward loop pharmacologically. AN: a 14DD/15DD-layer colonization where the "cannot not starve" has captured the identity layer — drugs address the wrong layer; only relationship and purpose-restructuring can reach it. Explains why the same treatment (pharmacology vs. psychoanalysis) works for one and fails for the other.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19501121
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-4
      
        Transplant Rejection and Consciousness-Mediated Regulation
        排异反应与意识调节 — Repositions transplant rejection within the SAE framework as a biological projection of 9DD (Selection), specifically Step 1's "label-without-constructing" function. Establishes a labeling sequence across the four rounds of Step 1 (1DD labels particles, 5DD labels macromolecules, 9DD labels cells and tissues). Derives the immunological self/non-self distinction as a 9DD structural necessity; explains why top-down 13DD regulation (mind-body practices, psychological states) can modulate but not override the 9DD labeling layer.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19588657
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-5
      
        The Phase-Transition Window in Depression
        抑郁症的相变窗口：起床气，相变间隙，与涵育 — Proposes a structural explanation for the suicide risk window during depression recovery: 13DD (agency/subjectivity) recovers faster than 14DD (institutional meaning-bearing structure), and the temporal gap between them constitutes a structurally determined danger window — not a pharmacological side effect. Sleep inertia (起床气) as a microcosm of the phase gap; cultivation (涵育) as the only structurally coherent therapeutic response. Derives specific predictions for the timing and typology of recovery-phase crises.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19589574
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-6
      
        The A Priori Structure of the Midlife Crisis
        中年危机的先验结构：14DD相变墙与15DD处方 — The midlife crisis is not a psychological disorder or contingent life event but the phase-transition window in which Step 2 of Round 4 (14DD, purpose) must leap to Step 3 (15DD, non-dual subjecthood). Derives the 14DD phase-transition wall as a structural necessity; explains why conventional therapies address symptoms rather than the transition itself. Prescribes the 15DD cultivation path as the only structurally coherent resolution. Identifies the asymmetry between successful and failed transitions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19590562
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-7
      
        Dissociative Identity and the Dissociation Spectrum
        多重人格与解离谱系：13DD的内部解剖，前额叶三功能位假说，与七个非平凡预测 — Extends the four-stage evolutionary model of 13DD by looking inward: 13DD contains at least three independently damageable functional positions — narrative ("this is me"), negation ("step back"), and conflict monitoring ("two predictions are fighting"). Maps these to the prefrontal tri-network (mPFC, dlPFC, ACC). Unifies the dissociation spectrum (DID, OSDD-1a, OSDD-1b, DPDR) and adjacent pathologies (depression, ADHD) via 11DD access and 13DD functional-position state. Seven non-trivial falsifiable predictions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600030
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-8
      
        ADHD and the AI Era: Configuration Release in the 14DD-Rich Type
        ADHD与AI时代：14DD丰度型的配置释放——诊断的双面性，N×4矩阵拓扑，与15DD网络压舱石 — ADHD reread as a 14DD-rich configuration whose costs and benefits invert with environmental structure. The AI era creates a new fitness landscape where 14DD abundance becomes an advantage — but only if 15DD network ballast is present. N×4 matrix topology maps the four ADHD subtypes against the four DD layers. Dual face of diagnosis: the same profile that constitutes disorder in 12DD-optimized environments constitutes configuration release in 15DD-rich ones.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19616408
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-9
      
        SAE Biology Note 9: The Memory System as a Method VI Phase Transition
        记忆系统作为一个方法论VI相变（粗颗粒度分析）— Applies the Method VI phase-transition window framework to the memory system at coarse granularity. The memory system is not a storage device but a phase-transition machine: encoding, consolidation, retrieval, and forgetting are four distinct phase states with structural transition conditions between them. Derives the SAE structural conditions under which long-term memory forms, why trauma memory is structurally different, and why sleep is not optional for consolidation.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19635022
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Bio-10
      
        SAE Biology Note 10: Anesthesia as Controlled Suppression of 13DD Fine-Layers
        麻醉作为13DD精细层的可控压制 — Anesthesia is not the object of SAE research — it is the tool SAE uses to see the internal structure of 13DD. Different anesthetic agents and doses suppress different fine-layers of 13DD in controllable, reversible, dose-dependent ways, constituting structural natural experiments. Derives the three-position model of 13DD (narrative, negation, conflict-monitoring) and maps each anesthetic agent to its specific layer targets. Explains why ketamine produces out-of-body reports while propofol does not.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19650534
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Applied — Biology & Evolution 生物学·演化
  
  

    
      12a
      
        Fixation and Selection (I) — Causal Law Forecloses Distinction
        固与选（一）——因果律封闭区分
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859363
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12b
      
        Fixation and Selection (II) — Reproductive Law Forecloses Replication
        固与选（二）——繁殖律封闭复制
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859393
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12c
      
        Fixation and Selection (III) — Predictive Law Forecloses Choice
        固与选（三）——预测律封闭选择
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859427
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      12d
      
        Fixation and Selection (IV) — Bilateral Non-Doubt Forecloses Self-Awareness
        固与选（四）——双向不疑封闭自意识
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18859452
          EN
        
      
    

    
      12e
      
        Fixation, Fragility, and Radiation: A Structural Theory of Mass Extinction Dynamics
        固、脆弱与辐射：大灭绝动力学的结构性理论 — Applied: lock-in depth (path dependence + confirmation bias + energy streamlining) as the unifying variable across the Big Five; trigger as interaction partner selecting which lock-in axes become lethal; remainder-enrichment ratchet explains post-extinction directional complexity without teleology.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19225113
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A25
      
        Aging: The Running Cost of the Chisel-Construct Cycle
        衰老：凿构循环的运行代价 — A Self-as-an-End meta-proposition. Second-order model: aging is not over-accumulation of damage (first-order) but progressive failure of the maintenance system itself (second-order). The tool of repair is itself aging — recursive degradation at every level (autophagy, synaptic downscaling, stem cells, telomerase). Core strategy: reduce maintenance load, not repair damage. Non-trivial prediction: prolonged DoC patients' prefrontal / DMN cortices may show slower epigenetic aging than age-matched controls, with nurturing implication — don't give up too soon.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364492
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A26
      
        The Remainder Structure of Sex Unfolding: A Cross-Phylum Non-Adaptive Model of Same-Sex Sexual Behavior
        SAE生物学应用：性别展开的余项结构——同性性行为的跨纲非适应性模型 — Sex is not a direct readout of DNA but the product of 5DD→7DD→8DD physical unfolding. Physical processes carry remainder; ESSP (exclusive same-sex partner preference) is the behavioral manifestation of unfolding remainder. Four sex determination systems compared (mammalian XY, avian ZW, reptilian TSD, fish social-signal). Asking "why does SSB exist" is like asking "why does sculpting produce debris" — the answer lies in the structure of the sculpting act itself. Four non-trivial predictions with explicit falsification conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19364915
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Life Cycle Table Series

papers.title: The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
papers.subtitle: 人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

papers.title: The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
papers.subtitle: 14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH

      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
