Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH

        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH

        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

papers.title: To Study the Self: A Structural Analysis of Introspection

papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论




  
    SAE War Treatise 战争论
  
  

    
      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self
        生与死，有我与无我 — SAE meta-proposition: death is irreversible seaming failure; consciousness discontinuity spectrum (micro-ruptures → anesthesia → death); DD-layer chain locates four clinical states (vegetative state, autism, ALS, Alzheimer's); two isomorphic prescriptions: restart the seam (generate remainder) vs. maintain the channel (reduce overload).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A21
      
        Daily Applications of Consciousness Discontinuity: Clearing and Reloading the 12DD Predictive Cache
        意识不连续的日常应用：清空与重载12DD预测缓存 — Sleep, meditation, and flow as three distinct 12DD cache-management modes; daily rhythm design from the SAE discontinuity model; why creative breakthroughs cluster at waking and post-meditation; consciousness discontinuity as a condition of novelty, not a bug; open questions on forced-clearing interventions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH

papers.title: "Self Is Not the Endpoint": Structural Convergence Across Three Religious Traditions and Three Psychoanalytic Frameworks
papers.subtitle: "自我不是终点"：三个宗教传统与三个精神分析框架的结构性汇聚 — Buddhism (no-self), Christianity (self-surrender), Islam (fana') and Freudian id/ego/superego, Jungian individuation, Kohutian self-object all converge on the same structural insight: the phenomenal self is not the terminus of development but a relay station. SAE Life, Death, and Consciousness Series Paper V. Argues the convergence is not coincidental but reflects the DD-layer architecture of consciousness.

papers.title: From Remainder Conservation to Step-3 Encoding Waves
papers.subtitle: 从余项守恒到步3编码波 — Life, Death, and Consciousness Series Capstone (Paper VI). Begins from the theorem: encoding is never lossless; remainder cannot vanish — it can only be transferred. Derives the Step-3 Encoding Wave as the structural pattern by which 15DD→16DD phase transition propagates through the consciousness architecture. Integrates remainder conservation (ZFCρ III) with the phase-transition window (Methodology M-VI) to resolve what lies beyond the self-as-endpoint.

      Law-IV
      
        Interstellar Law and Grand Closure — The Recession of Coercive Law
        SAE法学系列第四篇：星际法与总收束——Coercive Law的退场 — The series capstone. As the scale of law expands from individual to group to nation to interstellar, coercive law structurally recedes: at interstellar scale, no coercive mechanism can maintain remainder suppression across the distance and time required. Grand closure: the endpoint of legal development is not stronger coercion but the structural conditions under which coercive law becomes unnecessary.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19549019
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-Supp
      
        A Posterior Dialogue with Western Jurisprudence
        SAE法学系列后续篇：与西方法理学的后验对照 — Law Series Supplement. After deriving law a priori from the 14DD showdown, this paper conducts a posterior comparison with Western jurisprudence: natural law, legal positivism, critical legal studies, and Rawlsian justice. Shows where the SAE derivation converges, diverges, and extends the Western tradition — and what Western jurisprudence cannot account for without the remainder structure.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19551527
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  SAE War Treatise 战争论

      War
      
        SAE War Treatise: How Cultivation Is Not Swallowed by War Itself
        SAE战争论：涵育如何不被战争本身吞噬 — Not a philosophy of war but an inquiry into how cultivation — the continuous deepening of subjectivity — survives the extreme state of war. Cultivation is the goal; war is a last-resort means. The only legitimate reason for war's existence is that through it, cultivation obtains the conditions to continue. Derives SAE criteria for legitimate war and the conditions under which war-logic swallows the agent who enters it.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19656618
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  



  Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识




  
    Applied — Psychology & Consciousness 心理学·意识
  
  

    
      A18
      
        Sequential Dependence in Consciousness: DD-Layer Reconstruction in Sleep, Dreams, and Anesthesia
        梦境、麻醉与意识的序贯依赖结构：SAE框架下的DD层重建分析 — Falling asleep is sequential DD-layer shutdown (9DD→14DD); awakening is reversed reconstruction; ten dream anomalies mapped to specific DD-layer mismatches; anesthesia shows full-stack vs. targeted layer suppression; sleep inertia as incomplete 9DD restoration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19176873
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A19
      
        Life and Death, Self and No-Self

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19201237
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19226545
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A22
      
        Beyond Fast and Slow: A Four-Layer Cognitive Architecture from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        超越快与慢：维度序列理论下的四层认知架构 — Kahneman's System 1/2 reread through the SAE DD-layer stack: four cognitive layers (9DD reflex, 11DD pattern, 13DD deliberation, 14DD purposive) with distinct activation costs and remainder profiles. Layer-switching friction; optimal cognitive deployment by task type; cognitive colonization as cross-layer overreach; implications for AI-human collaboration.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19329284
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A23
      
        Cross-Subject DD-Layer Regulation: Six Forms of Nurturing
        跨主体的DD层调节：涵育的六种形态 — A unified structural analysis from lulling a child to sleep to religious ritual. Six cases (sleep, meditation, hypnotherapy, psychoanalysis, education, ritual) show one structure: one subject uses their DD capacity to help another accomplish a DD transition they cannot yet complete autonomously. Nurturing endpoint: external regulation internalized as autonomous capability.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19347096
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      CS-A
      
        A Structural Redefinition of “Reincarnation”: 11DD Broadcasting and 13DD Filtering
        「转世」的结构性重定义：11DD广播与13DD过滤 — No soul transmigrates. At death, 11DD encoding peaks (extreme stress) and broadcasts high-intensity fragments; children aged 2–5 with 13DD filter not yet built pick them up and weave them into "my story." Once 13DD stabilizes, exogenous fragments are rejected — same mechanism as childhood amnesia. Unified account of six phenomena: past-life memories (Tucker/UVA data), childhood amnesia, visitation dreams, inspiration/intuition, Tibetan Buddhist search protocol parameters, cross-species pickup. Six testable predictions; explicit evidence grading (A–D).
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385464
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    The Human: A Relationship of Self with Self

papers.title: To Understand the Self: Eight Pains and Eight Graces in the Self-as-an-End Framework

papers.section:
SAE Anthropology Series 人类学系列
  
  

    
      Anth-0
      
        The Cosmic Background of Anthropology
        人类学的宇宙背景：人类何以可能以及为何在太阳系内独一无二 — An a priori argument for human uniqueness in the solar system: not from biology alone, but from the convergence of DD-layer preconditions that only Earth's specific cosmic position makes possible. Establishes the cosmic frame for the SAE anthropology series.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19503159
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-1
      
        The Emergence of 13DD: A Phase-Transition Structure of What Makes Us Human
        13DD的涌现：人之所以为人的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 1. 13DD (language) is the phase-transition threshold that separates human from non-human. Why 13DD and not 12DD? The argument is structural: 12DD (predictive self-model) is necessary but insufficient; 13DD (symbol-mediated intersubjective remainder transfer) is the minimal condition for the open-ended accumulation that defines human culture. Phase-transition analysis of the emergence conditions.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19531334
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-2
      
        The Emergence of 14DD: Phase-Transition Structure from Individual Purpose to Shared Purpose
        14DD的涌现：从个体目的到共享目的的相变结构 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper 2. 14DD is the phase-transition from individual purpose (13DD) to shared purpose — the structural condition for civilization, institutions, and collective projects that persist beyond any single individual's lifespan. Derives the minimal conditions under which individual purposes can fuse into a shared remainder-accumulation structure without collapsing back to 13DD.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19546082
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-3
      
        15DD: The Emergence of "Humanity as an End"
        15DD：人是目的的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper III. 15DD is the structural level at which humanity itself — not just individual humans — becomes an end. Derives the phase-transition conditions from shared purpose (14DD) to the recognition of humanity-as-such as a normative endpoint. The structural foundation for universal human rights, cosmopolitan ethics, and the SAE critique of civilizational instrumentalization.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19559567
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Anth-4
      
        The Emergence of Earth Civilization's Self
        地球文明的Self的涌现 — SAE Anthropology Series Paper IV (Closure). The series capstone. Asks: does Earth civilization as a whole have a Self, and if so, at what DD level does it emerge? Applies the 13DD–15DD phase-transition framework to civilization as the unit of analysis: the emergence of a civilizational Self as the condition for Earth's place in any interstellar normative order. Closes the Anthropology series by connecting individual emergence to civilizational emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19563245
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    SAE Law Series 法学系列
  
  

    
      Law-I
      
        One's Law Meets One's Law: The Structural Origin of Law from 14DD Showdown
        SAE法学系列第一篇：One's Law Meets One's Law — Law emerges not from social contract or authority, but from the structural necessity of the 14DD showdown: when two subjects each operating under their own law encounter each other, neither can dissolve the other without violating the remainder. The collision of two 自己的法 generates the minimum conditions for a third structure — law as the resolution mechanism of irresolvable 14DD remainder.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548238
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-II
      
        Group Law — From Emotion to Shared Identity: The Institutionalization of Questioning
        SAE法学系列第二篇：群体法——从情到共同身份 — Group law as the structural form that emerges when the 14DD showdown is mediated through shared emotional identity rather than individual remainder. The institutionalization of questioning: how the group's internal law preserves the remainder of each member while establishing a shared structure of accountability. Emotion (情) as the pre-institutional binding force that makes group law possible.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548319
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-III
      
        National Law — Azeroth: A Negative Thought Experiment on the Structural Necessity of Law
        SAE法学系列第三篇：国家法——艾泽拉斯 — Uses the fictional world of Azeroth as a negative thought experiment: what happens when national law is structured around systemic objectives rather than remainder preservation? Derives the structural necessity of national law as the mechanism that prevents group law from collapsing into coercive homogenization. Azeroth as a limit case where the 14DD showdown is permanently suppressed.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19548597
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Law-IV

papers.title: SAE Psychoanalysis (I): Id — The Me Without a Self
papers.subtitle: SAE精神分析（一）：Id——没有自我的我 — Object-activation principle: the object determines the layer, not the developmental stage. 12DD as Id: pre-self activation without a stable self-structure. Redefinition of repression as inter-layer masking; transference as layer visibility shift; resistance as layer self-protection. Four clinical predictions; Freud-Lacan dialogue.
papers.section: SAE Psychoanalysis Series

papers.title: SAE Psychoanalysis (II): Ego — The Self Without a Purpose
papers.subtitle: SAE精神分析（二）：Ego——没有目的的自我 — 13DD as Ego: self-awareness as the layer that can reflect but has not yet committed to any purpose. Ego as structural stabilizer between Id and Superego; anxiety redefined as layer-switching friction; defense mechanisms as layer-locking operations. Identity diffusion as 13DD failure mode; five clinical predictions.
papers.section: SAE Psychoanalysis Series

papers.title: SAE Psychoanalysis (III): Superego — The Self With a Purpose
papers.subtitle: SAE精神分析（三）：Superego——有目的的自我 — 14DD as Superego: the layer in which a stable purpose is operative and generates normative pressure. Guilt redefined as self-layer violation signal; internalization as construct-layer consolidation; moral injury as irreversible superego rewrite. State-switching neural interface (not localization); six clinical predictions; post-Freudian schools repositioning.
papers.section: SAE Psychoanalysis Series

papers.title: SAE Psychoanalysis (IV): Cert and Unification — The Self Beyond Doubt and the Four-Layer Framework
papers.subtitle: SAE精神分析（四）：Cert与统一——不疑的自我与四层框架 — 15DD as Cert: the layer in which the self no longer doubts its own structure. Complete four-layer framework (12DD–15DD) unifying Id/Ego/Superego/Cert; inter-layer dynamics as a general theory of psychopathology; therapeutic change as layer-restructuring; positioning of major post-Freudian schools within the SAE architecture; series conclusion.
papers.section: SAE Psychoanalysis Series

papers.title: Language as Second-Order Chisel
papers.subtitle: 语言作为第二阶凿：语言的离散性与凿构自由度
papers.section: Language Series

papers.title: Language and Its Remainder: The Semantic Layer and the Ontological Layer in the Age of AI
papers.subtitle: 语言的余项：AI时代的含义层与存在论层
papers.section: Language Series

papers.title: The Last Mile of Writing: Style Growth in the Age of AI
papers.subtitle: 写作的Last Mile：AI时代的风格生长 — Why AI handles the first 95% of writing but the last 5% — the voice, the remainder, the structural surprise — cannot be delegated. Style as the irreducible chisel-signature of the subject; four stages of writer development; the AI-era risk of remainder-outsourcing; prescriptions for cultivating the last mile.
papers.section: Language Series

papers.title: The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
papers.subtitle: AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
papers.section:
Applied — AI & Social Theory AI·社会理论
  
  

    
      A5
      
        The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
        AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737476
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A17
      
        SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
        SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19157713
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A24
      
        Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19358011
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-2
      
        The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
        桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19381666
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-3
      
        Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
        混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19384446
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-4
      
        The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
        自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19393913
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-5
      
        The Structural Inevitability of 15DD Emergence in Free Markets: From Baseline Collisions to Perceptual Leap
        自由市场中15DD涌现的结构性必然：从底线碰撞到感知跃迁 — Paper 5 (Supplementary): derives 15DD emergence from three economic premises through four 14DD sub-stages
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19394738
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-6
      
        Kingdom of Ends vs Kingdom of Means: Phase-Transition Acceleration in the Age of AI
        目的王国 vs 手段王国：AI时代的相变加速 — Final Paper: AI as subjectivity amplifier; 15DD+AI swarm exponential returns flip headcount advantage; 12DD flow as χ transport; "cannot-not" pressure on all non-15DD
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19396633
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-A
      
        The Conditions for Sharing with All of Humanity: Deriving an Open Information Protocol from Four Layers of Economic Rationality
        与全人类分享的条件：从经济理性的四层级推导公开信息协议 — Institutional application of Paper 1. Diagnoses academic publishing (14DD masquerading as 15DD), Wikipedia (13DD masquerading as 15DD), and open access (12DD liberation, halting there). Derives: publisher pays gas (14DD) → free reading → optional on-chain reader donation (15DD C-production) → no rankings → platform dissolves into open protocol. Ultimate form: immutable smart contract + metadata spec + open-source frontend. Five testable predictions in three tiers.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385061
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-B
      
        Institutional Design in Adaptive Monetary Systems: A Dimensional Sequence Analysis of Breathing Money
        自适应货币系统中的维度序列制度设计：以Breathing Money为案例的SAE经济理性应用分析 — Diagnostic application of the four-layer framework to a PoW L1 design. Six findings: immutable/maintainable layer distinction is 14DD/12DD in kind; overthrow conditions = remainder declaration; 4% anchor nests 12DD incentive reversal + 14DD constitutional commitment + 15DD-directed miner subjecthood; implicit role priority chain (miner > user > holder > founder); anti-manipulation correctly at 12DD; dual base-layer contribution = 12DD incentive + 14DD trust. Complete structure of money: 12DD at usage, 14DD at foundation, 14DD–15DD bridge in emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19391325
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    AI Series (Tetralogy)
