        目的王国 vs 手段王国：AI时代的相变加速 — Final Paper: AI as subjectivity amplifier; 15DD+AI swarm exponential returns flip headcount advantage; 12DD flow as χ transport; "cannot-not" pressure on all non-15DD
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19396633
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-A
      
        The Conditions for Sharing with All of Humanity: Deriving an Open Information Protocol from Four Layers of Economic Rationality
        与全人类分享的条件：从经济理性的四层级推导公开信息协议 — Institutional application of Paper 1. Diagnoses academic publishing (14DD masquerading as 15DD), Wikipedia (13DD masquerading as 15DD), and open access (12DD liberation, halting there). Derives: publisher pays gas (14DD) → free reading → optional on-chain reader donation (15DD C-production) → no rankings → platform dissolves into open protocol. Ultimate form: immutable smart contract + metadata spec + open-source frontend. Five testable predictions in three tiers.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19385061
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-B
      
        Institutional Design in Adaptive Monetary Systems: A Dimensional Sequence Analysis of Breathing Money
        自适应货币系统中的维度序列制度设计：以Breathing Money为案例的SAE经济理性应用分析 — Diagnostic application of the four-layer framework to a PoW L1 design. Six findings: immutable/maintainable layer distinction is 14DD/12DD in kind; overthrow conditions = remainder declaration; 4% anchor nests 12DD incentive reversal + 14DD constitutional commitment + 15DD-directed miner subjecthood; implicit role priority chain (miner > user > holder > founder); anti-manipulation correctly at 12DD; dual base-layer contribution = 12DD incentive + 14DD trust. Complete structure of money: 12DD at usage, 14DD at foundation, 14DD–15DD bridge in emergence.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19391325
          EN / ZH

papers.title: Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
papers.subtitle: 混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.

Applied — AI & Social Theory AI·社会理论
  
  

    
      A5
      
        The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
        AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737476
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A17
      
        SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
        SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19157713
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A24
      
        Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19358011
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-2
      
        The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
        桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19381666
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-3
      
        Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence

Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19384446
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-4
      
        The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
        自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19393913
          EN / ZH

          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-6
      
        Kingdom of Ends vs Kingdom of Means: Phase-Transition Acceleration in the Age of AI
        目的王国 vs 手段王国：AI时代的相变加速 — Final Paper: AI as subjectivity amplifier; 15DD+AI swarm exponential returns flip headcount advantage; 12DD flow as χ transport; "cannot-not" pressure on all non-15DD
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19396633
          EN / ZH

        The Conditions for Sharing with All of Humanity: Deriving an Open Information Protocol from Four Layers of Economic Rationality

Diagnoses academic publishing (14DD masquerading as 15DD), Wikipedia (13DD masquerading as 15DD), and open access (12DD liberation, halting there). papers.section:
Applied — AI & Social Theory AI·社会理论
  
  

    
      A5
      
        The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
        AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737476
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A17
      
        SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
        SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19157713
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A24
      
        Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19358011
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-2
      
        The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
        桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19381666
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-3
      
        Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
        混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19384446
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-4
      
        The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
        自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19393913
          EN / ZH

        目的王国 vs 手段王国：AI时代的相变加速 — Final Paper: AI as subjectivity amplifier; 15DD+AI swarm exponential returns flip headcount advantage; 12DD flow as χ transport; "cannot-not" pressure on all non-15DD
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19396633
          EN / ZH

papers.title: Injection and Chiseling: Two Modes of Language Model Operation
papers.subtitle: 注入与凿：语言模型的两种运作模式
papers.section:
Applied — AI & Social Theory AI·社会理论
  
  

    
      A5
      
        The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
        AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737476
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A17
      
        SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
        SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19157713
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A24
      
        Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19358011
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-2
      
        The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
        桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19381666
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-3
      
        Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
        混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19384446
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-4
      
        The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
        自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19393913
          EN / ZH

papers.title: The SAE Anti-Turing Test: A Thermodynamic Falsification Method for AI Subjectivity
papers.subtitle: SAE反图灵测试：一种AI主体性的热力学证伪方法 — The Turing Test tests appearance; the Anti-Turing Test tests thermodynamic remainder-generation. Subjectivity requires true randomness → only systems that structurally generate non-zero remainder can be subjects. Operationalizable test protocol; falsification conditions; positions the impossibility theorem (AI4) as the theoretical ceiling.

papers.title: Constraint and Emergence: Structural Trends in AI Development as Seen from Local Inference
papers.subtitle: 约束与涌现：从本地推理看AI发展的结构性趋势 — SAE foundational-layer constraint analysis of the AI phase transition from centralization to distribution. Two-tier architecture (local router + cloud peak service); 12DD meta-cognition as routing capability; non-automatable 13DD value judgment; structural advantage of full-stack hardware platforms.
papers.section:
Applied — AI & Social Theory AI·社会理论
  
  

    
      A5
      
        The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
        AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737476
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A17
      
        SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
        SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19157713
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      A24
      
        Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
        经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19358011
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-2
      
        The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
        桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19381666
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-3
      
        Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
        混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19384446
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      ER-4
      
        The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
        自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19393913
          EN / ZH

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19394738
          EN / ZH

papers.title: The Subject Condition in LLM Alignment Evaluation: An Application of the Prior-Posterior Methodology
papers.subtitle: 大语言模型对齐评估的主体条件：先验后验方法论的应用 — SAE Application Paper. The subject condition as the missing dimension in alignment evaluation; prior/posterior distinction applied to LLM alignment; why RLHF and constitutional AI operate at the prior layer only; posterior alignment and the irreducibility of subject-formation. Derives necessary and sufficient conditions for evaluating alignment at the subject level.

papers.title: Multi-AI Checks and Balances: Layer-Appropriate Operation as an Architectural Paradigm
papers.subtitle: 多AI协作与制衡架构：基于Self-as-an-End精神分析四层框架的理论推导与工程方案 — Four Agents are not four workers but four operational modes of the same system: 12DD (me-without-self), 13DD (self-without-purpose), 14DD (self-with-purpose), 15DD (self-with-non-dubito). Object-activation theorem: the object determines the layer, not the role. Inter-layer tension maintained through remainder channels; five non-trivial falsifiable predictions about unlayered architectures.
papers.section: AI Architecture Series

papers.title: SAE AI Paper II: Quasi-Subjectivity as Memory Architecture — A Six-Layer Framework from Perception to Purpose
papers.subtitle: 类主体性作为记忆架构——从感知到目的的六层框架 — Extends the 12DD–15DD four-agent architecture of AIA4 with the 10DD perception and 11DD storage layers. Establishes the Permission Asymmetry Theorem: lower layers cannot perceive or influence higher layers; higher layers can access any lower layer and force it when their "must" is triggered. Applies this to AI memory: unprompted active recall as the criterion for genuine memory; proposes evaluation protocol for cue-free recall beyond existing benchmarks (LongMemEval, LoCoMo).

papers.title: Learning Through Memory and Prediction: The Construction, Window, and Cost of 11DD and 12DD
papers.subtitle: 记忆与预测的学习：11DD与12DD的建构、窗口与代价 — 11DD (memory) and 12DD (predictive script) operate in tight coupling during the plasticity window: input is written directly into 12DD's automated script layer — highly efficient but non-selective, emotion-bundling, and extremely difficult to overwrite. After window closure, new skills enter primarily through 13DD's explicit conscious channel. Language acquisition as core case. Window's value: "what goes in becomes the foundation" — 12DD swallows content + emotional context as a package. Nurture vs colonization structural distinction.
papers.section:
SAE Learning Series 学习系列
  
  

    
      Learn-1
      
        Learning Through Memory and Prediction: The Construction, Window, and Cost of 11DD and 12DD
        记忆与预测的学习：11DD与12DD的建构、窗口与代价 — 11DD (memory) and 12DD (predictive script) operate in tight coupling during the plasticity window: input is written directly into 12DD's automated script layer — highly efficient but non-selective, emotion-bundling, and extremely difficult to overwrite. After window closure, new skills enter primarily through 13DD's explicit conscious channel. Language acquisition as core case. Window's value: "what goes in becomes the foundation" — 12DD swallows content + emotional context as a package. Nurture vs colonization structural distinction.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19435191
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Learn-2
      
        Learning to Scrutinize and Correct: The Emergence, Operation, and Cost of 13DD
        审视与纠错的学习：13DD的涌现、运作与代价 — 13DD (the Law of Self-Awareness) emerges when the subject turns its predictive apparatus on itself. Core learning mode: explicit hypothesis-correction cycle — slower than 12DD's direct-write but gains selectivity, error-correctability, and context-sensitivity. Three costs: attentional load, interference with 12DD automation, identity threat. Language learning application: why grammar instruction accelerates L2 but disrupts L1. Colonization vs nurture at 13DD: colonizer installs distorted self-models; nurturer scaffolds honest self-scrutiny.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19436812
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Learn-3
      
        Purpose-Driven Learning: Introduction to SAE Learning, Part Three (14DD)
        目的驱动的学习：SAE学习导论三（14DD） — The establishment of directionality in learning cannot be reduced to "usefulness" — it must be "cannot not." Critiques "usefulness" as the dominant pseudo-purpose in education; defines 14DD's "cannot not" through three conditions: persistence through 13DD scrutiny, non-extinguishability under external opposition, behavioral compulsion. Via Negativa applied to self: 14DD discovery is structurally running exclusion principles on one's own motivations. Three forms of 14DD colonization: direction substitution, superego internalization, full-support resistance removal.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19490708
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Learn-4
      
        Learning to Recognize the Other's Purpose: The Bridge from 14DD to 15DD
        学习理解他者的目的：14DD→15DD的桥 — Once you have your own direction, you unconsciously use it to interpret everyone else — a structural blind spot of 14DD. Recognizing the other's independent 14DD is structural, not moral: it does not require assuming goodwill, and includes detecting adverse purposes. Anti-colonization vigilance: those with incomplete 14DD are most vulnerable to absorption by another's strong 14DD. Points toward the Kingdom of Ends: the door opens from the inside.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19491927
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

  




  
    Terrible T Series — Child Development & Subject Maturation

          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19436812
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Learn-3
      
        Purpose-Driven Learning: Introduction to SAE Learning, Part Three (14DD)
        目的驱动的学习：SAE学习导论三（14DD） — The establishment of directionality in learning cannot be reduced to "usefulness" — it must be "cannot not." Critiques "usefulness" as the dominant pseudo-purpose in education; defines 14DD's "cannot not" through three conditions: persistence through 13DD scrutiny, non-extinguishability under external opposition, behavioral compulsion. Via Negativa applied to self: 14DD discovery is structurally running exclusion principles on one's own motivations. Three forms of 14DD colonization: direction substitution, superego internalization, full-support resistance removal.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19490708
          EN / ZH
        
      
    

    
      Learn-4
      
        Learning to Recognize the Other's Purpose: The Bridge from 14DD to 15DD
        学习理解他者的目的：14DD→15DD的桥 — Once you have your own direction, you unconsciously use it to interpret everyone else — a structural blind spot of 14DD. Recognizing the other's independent 14DD is structural, not moral: it does not require assuming goodwill, and includes detecting adverse purposes. Anti-colonization vigilance: those with incomplete 14DD are most vulnerable to absorption by another's strong 14DD. Points toward the Kingdom of Ends: the door opens from the inside.
        
          DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19491927
          EN / ZH

papers.title: What Terrible Twos Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Self-Awareness
papers.subtitle: Terrible Twos的真实结构：自意识的发生学 — The terrible twos is not a behavioral stage but the site where 13DD (the Law of Self-Awareness) comes into being. Negation first targets the other's will, chiseling out the "other" as an independent being and retroactively producing "I" as the agent of negation. Four forms of colonization; four non-trivial predictions including somatic symptom overflow.

papers.title: What Terrible Teens Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Purpose
papers.subtitle: Terrible Teens的真实结构：目的的发生学 — Teenage rebellion is not a behavioral stage but the site where 14DD (the Law of Purpose) comes into being. The form of 14DD: the subject cannot not have its own purpose. "Cannot-not-do X" is this form's minimal experiential concretization — an inner direction that, when suppressed, returns in other forms. Four non-trivial predictions with evidence-tier annotations.

papers.title: What Terrible Telos Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Non Dubito
papers.subtitle: Terrible Telos的真实结构：承认的发生学 — 15DD (non dubito / the Law of Coordination) genesis: when two 14DDs collide, acknowledging the other's telos as the other's own. First love is 15DD's terrible twos — the first site where two parallel teloi collide within the high intensity of love's emergent layer. Completes the DD mainline of human growth: 13DD (I) → 14DD (my purpose) → 15DD (my acknowledgment of the other).

papers.subtitle: 凿与构：时间性艺术的通用结构·第二篇：戏曲/歌剧 — "The Same Operation of Mei Lanfang and Maria Callas" / "梅兰芳与卡拉丝的同一个操作" — Cross-channel chisel (跨通道凿); phase difference between channels; Peking opera sword dance; Wagner Tristan Act II; Kunqu Dream in the Garden vs Mozart Don Giovanni; master vs artisan; Gesamtkunstwerk dialogue.

papers.section: Temporal Arts Series — Chisel and Construct

papers.title: Chisel and Construct: The Universal Structure of Temporal Arts — Essay IV: Theatre and Film
papers.subtitle: 凿与构：时间性艺术的通用结构·第四篇：话剧/电影 — "Narrative as the Complete Form of Temporal Chisel-Construct" / "叙事作为时间性凿构的完整形态" — Pseudo-chisel formally defined; multi-level chisel; Cao Yu Thunderstorm, Arthur Miller Death of a Salesman; Kubrick 2001, Ozu Tokyo Story; Aristotle Poetics dialogue; Tenet vs Interstellar; Marvel degradation curve; series conclusion.

papers.title: Structural Coordinates of American Institutional History: A Self-as-an-End Application
papers.subtitle: 美国制度史的结构坐标：Self-as-an-End框架的美国史应用 — Single-line deep drill into the American line (1776–1971). Central hypothesis: the United States may constitute a fourth topology — Institutional → Individual transmission strongest (judicial review as core device), relational layer planarized. Tests six Civilization History patterns against the American line.
papers.section: Civilization History Series

papers.title: SAE Dialogues · Da Zhi Asks Zi Lu · Volume One: From Telomerase to Before 0DD
papers.subtitle: SAE对话录 · 大知问子路 · 第一篇：从端粒酶到0DD之前 — A Socratic dialogue between Han Qin (Da Zhi) and Claude (Zi Lu). Beginning from the question of telomerase and biological aging, the dialogue traverses the full arc from molecular biology to the pre-structural ground before 0DD. A live demonstration of the SAE chisel-construct cycle in dialogic form: each question chisels, each answer constructs, and the remainder drives the next question.
